papers.title: LLM-Agent-based Social Simulation for Attitude Diffusion
papers.abstract: This paper introduces discourse_simulator, an open-source framework that combines LLMs with agent-based modelling. It offers a new way to simulate how public attitudes toward immigration change over time in response to salient events like protests, controversies, or policy debates. Large language models (LLMs) are used to generate social media posts, interpret opinions, and model how ideas spread through social networks. Unlike traditional agent-based models that rely on fixed, rule-based opinion updates and cannot generate natural language or consider current events, this approach integrates multidimensional sociological belief structures and real-world event timelines. This framework is wrapped into an open-source Python package that integrates generative agents into a small-world network topology and a live news retrieval system. discourse_sim is purpose-built as a social science research instrument specifically for studying attitude dynamics, polarisation, and belief evolution following real-world critical events. Unlike other LLM Agent Swarm frameworks, which treat the simulations as a prediction black box, discourse_sim treats it as a theory-testing instrument, which is fundamentally a different epistemological stance for studying social science problems. The paper further demonstrates the framework by modelling the Dublin anti-immigration march on April 26, 2025, with N=100 agents over a 15-day simulation. Package link: https://pypi.org/project/discourse-sim/

analysis.tldr: 提出 discourse_simulator 框架，结合 LLM 与基于智能体的建模，模拟公众对移民态度的动态变化。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统基于智能体的模型依赖固定规则，无法生成自然语言或考虑当前事件，难以真实模拟态度动态和极化过程。
analysis.problem: 如何利用 LLM 构建可解释、可测试的社会态度扩散模拟框架，以研究真实事件后的态度演变。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 discourse_simulator 开源框架，将 LLM 集成到小世界网络拓扑和实时新闻检索系统中，生成社交媒体帖子、解释观点并模拟观点传播，结合多维社会学信念结构和真实事件时间线。
contributions: 提出 discourse_simulator 框架，将 LLM 与基于智能体的建模结合用于态度扩散模拟。
开源 Python 包，支持理论测试而非黑箱预测，提供新的社会科学研究工具。
analysis.experiments: 以 2025 年 4 月 26 日都柏林反移民游行为例，使用 100 个智能体进行 15 天模拟，但摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 模拟规模有限（100 个智能体），可能无法完全代表真实社会网络复杂性。
依赖 LLM 生成质量，可能引入偏见或不一致。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 discourse_simulator 框架，结合 LLM 与基于智能体的建模，模拟公众对移民态度的动态变化。

papers.title: Latency-Aware Resource Allocation over Heterogeneous Networks: A Lorentz-Invariant Market Mechanism
papers.abstract: We present a telecom-native auction mechanism for allocating bandwidth and time slots across heterogeneous-delay networks, ranging from low-Earth-orbit (LEO) satellite constellations to delay-tolerant deep-space relays. The Lorentz-Invariant Auction (LIA) treats bids as spacetime events and reweights reported values based on the \emph{horizon slack}, a causal quantity derived from the earliest-arrival times relative to a public clearing horizon. Unlike other delay-equalization rules, LIA combines a causal-ordering formulation, a uniquely exponential slack correction implied by a semigroup-style invariance axiom, and a critical-value implementation that ensures truthful reported values once slacks are fixed by trusted infrastructure. We analyze the incentive result in the exogenous-slack regime and separately examine bounded slack-estimation error and endogenous-delay limitations. Under fixed feasible slacks, LIA is individually rational and achieves welfare at least \(e^{-λΔ}\) relative to the optimal feasible allocation, where \(Δ\) is the slack spread. We evaluate LIA on STARLINK-200, INTERNET-100, and DSN-30 across 52,500 baseline instances with market sizes \(n\in\{10,20,30,40,50\}\) and conduct additional robustness sweeps. On Starlink and Internet, LIA maintains near-efficiency while eliminating measured timing rents. However, on DSN, welfare is lower in thin markets but improves with depth. We also distinguish winner-determination time from the background cost of maintaining slack estimates and study robustness beyond independent and identically distributed (iid) noise through error-spread bounds and structured (distance-biased and subnetwork-correlated) noise models. These results suggest that causal-consistent mechanism design offers a practical non-buffering alternative to synchronized delay equalization in heterogeneous telecom infrastructures.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于洛伦兹不变性的电信原生拍卖机制，在异构延迟网络中实现接近最优的带宽分配，同时消除计时租金。
analysis.research_motivation: 异构延迟网络（如LEO卫星和深空中继）中，不同链路的传播延迟差异巨大，传统同步延迟均衡方法需要大量缓冲，效率低下且不适用于高延迟场景。
analysis.problem: 如何在异构延迟网络中设计一种无需全局同步、抗延迟差异的带宽与时隙分配机制，同时保证激励兼容性和分配效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出传统延迟均衡规则存在效率损失和计时租金问题。
analysis.method: 提出Lorentz-Invariant Auction (LIA)，将投标视为时空事件，基于最早到达时间与公共清算视界计算horizon slack，采用指数松弛校正和临界值实现，确保在固定松弛下投标真实。
contributions: 提出一种电信原生的拍卖机制LIA，利用因果序和半群不变性公理设计指数松弛校正。
证明在固定可行松弛下，LIA满足个体理性且社会福利至少为最优可行分配的e^{-λΔ}倍。
在STARLINK-200、INTERNET-100和DSN-30三个数据集上验证，LIA在Starlink和Internet上接近效率且消除计时租金，在DSN上薄市场效率较低但随市场深度改善。
analysis.experiments: 在STARLINK-200、INTERNET-100和DSN-30三个数据集上，共52,500个基线实例，市场大小n∈{10,20,30,40,50}，并进行了鲁棒性扫描（包括非iid噪声模型）。
limitations: 在DSN等薄市场中，当市场深度不足时福利较低。
机制依赖于可信基础设施提供的松弛估计，松弛估计误差可能影响激励兼容性。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于洛伦兹不变性的电信原生拍卖机制，在异构延迟网络中实现接近最优的带宽分配，同时消除计时租金。

papers.title: FeynmanBench: Benchmarking Multimodal LLMs on Diagrammatic Physics Reasoning
papers.abstract: Breakthroughs in frontier theory often depend on the combination of concrete diagrammatic notations with rigorous logic. While multimodal large language models (MLLMs) show promise in general scientific tasks, current benchmarks often focus on local information extraction rather than the global structural logic inherent in formal scientific notations. In this work, we introduce FeynmanBench, the first benchmark centered on Feynman diagram tasks. It is designed to evaluate AI's capacity for multistep diagrammatic reasoning, which requires satisfying conservation laws and symmetry constraints, identifying graph topology, converting between diagrammatic and algebraic representations, and constructing scattering amplitudes under specific conventions and gauges. To support large-scale and reproducible evaluation, we developed an automated pipeline producing diverse Feynman diagrams along with verifiable topological annotations and amplitude results. Our database spans the electromagnetic, weak, and strong interactions of the Standard Model, encompasses over 100 distinct types and includes more than 2000 tasks. Experiments on state-of-the-art MLLMs reveal systematic failure modes, including unstable enforcement of physical constraints and violations of global topological conditions, highlighting the need for physics-grounded benchmarks for visual reasoning over scientific notation. FeynmanBench provides a logically rigorous test of whether AI can effectively engage in scientific discovery, particularly within theoretical physics.

analysis.tldr: 首个聚焦费曼图推理的多模态LLM基准，揭示模型在全局结构逻辑上的系统性失败。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有科学任务基准多关注局部信息提取，缺乏对形式化科学符号中全局结构逻辑的评估，而前沿理论突破常依赖图表与逻辑的结合。
analysis.problem: 评估多模态大模型在费曼图任务上的多步图表推理能力，包括守恒律、对称性约束、图拓扑识别、图表与代数表示转换及散射振幅构建。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验发现最先进MLLM存在系统性失败模式：物理约束执行不稳定、违反全局拓扑条件。
analysis.method: 构建自动化管线生成多样化费曼图及可验证的拓扑注释和振幅结果，覆盖标准模型电磁、弱、强相互作用，包含100多种类型和2000多个任务。
contributions: 提出首个以费曼图任务为中心的多模态LLM基准FeynmanBench
揭示当前MLLM在图表推理中违反物理约束和全局拓扑条件的系统性缺陷
analysis.experiments: 在多个最先进MLLM上进行了实验，发现系统性失败模式，但摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖标准模型，未涉及超出标准模型的物理场景
自动化管线可能无法完全模拟真实物理推理中的歧义性
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个聚焦费曼图推理的多模态LLM基准，揭示模型在全局结构逻辑上的系统性失败。

papers.title: CURE:Circuit-Aware Unlearning for LLM-based Recommendation
papers.abstract: Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have opened new opportunities for recommender systems by enabling rich semantic understanding and reasoning about user interests and item attributes. However, as privacy regulations tighten, incorporating user data into LLM-based recommendation (LLMRec) introduces significant privacy risks, making unlearning algorithms increasingly crucial for practical deployment. Despite growing interest in LLMRec unlearning, most existing approaches formulate unlearning as a weighted combination of forgetting and retaining objectives while updating model parameters in a uniform manner. Such formulations inevitably induce gradient conflicts between the two objectives, leading to unstable optimization and resulting in either ineffective unlearning or severe degradation of model utility. Moreover, the unlearning procedure remains largely black-box, undermining its transparency and trustworthiness. To tackle these challenges, we propose CURE, a circuit-aware unlearning framework that disentangles model components into functionally distinct subsets and selectively updates them. Here, a circuit refers to a computational subgraph that is causally responsible for task-specific behaviors. Specifically, we extract the core circuits underlying item recommendation and analyze how individual modules within these circuits contribute to the forget and retain objectives. Based on this analysis, these modules are categorized into forget-specific, retain-specific, and task-shared groups, each subject to function-specific update rules to mitigate gradient conflicts during unlearning. Experiments on real-world datasets show that our approach achieves more effective unlearning than existing baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出电路感知遗忘框架CURE，通过解耦模型组件并选择性更新，缓解LLM推荐系统中遗忘与保留目标的梯度冲突。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM推荐系统面临隐私法规压力，需要遗忘算法移除用户数据影响，但现有方法统一更新参数导致遗忘与保留目标冲突，且遗忘过程不透明。
analysis.problem: 现有LLM推荐遗忘方法中，遗忘与保留目标的梯度冲突导致优化不稳定，遗忘效果差或模型效用严重下降，且遗忘过程缺乏可解释性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出现有方法将遗忘建模为遗忘与保留目标的加权组合，统一更新参数，必然导致梯度冲突，造成不稳定优化。
analysis.method: 提出CURE框架，通过因果分析提取推荐核心电路，将模块分为遗忘专用、保留专用和任务共享三类，分别采用功能特定的更新规则以缓解梯度冲突。
contributions: 提出电路感知遗忘框架CURE，通过解耦模型组件实现选择性更新。
通过因果分析识别推荐核心电路并分类模块，设计功能特定更新规则缓解梯度冲突。
analysis.experiments: 在真实数据集上实验，CURE比现有基线实现更有效的遗忘。
limitations: 可能依赖因果分析的质量和计算开销。
未讨论对大规模LLM的扩展性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出电路感知遗忘框架CURE，通过解耦模型组件并选择性更新，缓解LLM推荐系统中遗忘与保留目标的梯度冲突。

papers.title: PolySwarm: A Multi-Agent Large Language Model Framework for Prediction Market Trading and Latency Arbitrage
papers.abstract: This paper presents PolySwarm, a novel multi-agent large language model (LLM) framework designed for real-time prediction market trading and latency arbitrage on decentralized platforms such as Polymarket. PolySwarm deploys a swarm of 50 diverse LLM personas that concurrently evaluate binary outcome markets, aggregating individual probability estimates through confidence-weighted Bayesian combination of swarm consensus with market-implied probabilities, and applying quarter-Kelly position sizing for risk-controlled execution. The system incorporates an information-theoretic market analysis engine using Kullback-Leibler (KL) divergence and Jensen-Shannon (JS) divergence to detect cross-market inefficiencies and negation pair mispricings. A latency arbitrage module exploits stale Polymarket prices by deriving CEX-implied probabilities from a log-normal pricing model and executing trades within the human reaction-time window. We provide a full architectural description, implementation details, and evaluation methodology using Brier scores, calibration analysis, and log-loss metrics benchmarked against human superforecaster performance. We further discuss open challenges including hallucination in agent pools, computational cost at scale, regulatory exposure, and feedback-loop risk, and outline five priority directions for future research. Experimental results demonstrate that swarm aggregation consistently outperforms single-model baselines in probability calibration on Polymarket prediction tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个50个LLM智能体组成的多智能体框架，用于预测市场交易和延迟套利，通过置信加权贝叶斯聚合和四分之凯利仓位管理提升概率校准。
analysis.research_motivation: 预测市场交易需要实时、准确的概率估计，但现有单模型方法存在校准不足和延迟套利机会未被充分利用的问题。
analysis.problem: 如何利用多智能体LLM框架在去中心化预测市场上实现更优的概率校准和延迟套利。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 部署50个不同LLM角色同时评估二元结果市场，通过置信加权贝叶斯组合聚合个体概率估计，结合市场隐含概率，并应用四分之凯利仓位管理进行风险控制；利用KL散度和JS散度检测跨市场低效和否定对错误定价；通过对数正态定价模型从CEX推导隐含概率，在人类反应时间窗口内执行交易。
contributions: 提出PolySwarm多智能体LLM框架，用于预测市场交易和延迟套利。
引入置信加权贝叶斯聚合和四分之凯利仓位管理方法。
设计信息论市场分析引擎和延迟套利模块。
analysis.experiments: 在Polymarket预测任务上，使用Brier分数、校准分析和对数损失指标评估，与人类超级预测者性能对比，实验表明群聚合在概率校准上持续优于单模型基线。
limitations: 智能体池中的幻觉问题。
大规模计算成本。
监管风险和反馈循环风险。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个50个LLM智能体组成的多智能体框架，用于预测市场交易和延迟套利，通过置信加权贝叶斯聚合和四分之凯利仓位管理提升概率校准。

papers.title: Regime-Calibrated Fleet Repositioning with a Spatial Queue-Regret Decomposition
papers.abstract: Ride-hailing and autonomous mobility-on-demand operators reposition idle supply before future demand is fully observed. We study a retrieval-calibrated predict-then-optimize approach for this problem: historical demand regimes are matched to the current query block, combined into a calibrated demand prior, and passed to a fleet-balancing controller. The paper makes three contributions. First, we train a leakage-safe similarity gate whose objective penalizes demand error, pickup spatial mismatch, and queue shortage risk rather than retrieval rank alone. Second, we develop a spatial queue-regret decomposition for a stable queueing surrogate, linking demand-field error to wait through queueing sensitivity, allocator sensitivity, and Wasserstein pickup mismatch. Third, we evaluate learned retrieval and external-style rebalancing baselines in a common simulator. In the calibrated-demand gate experiment, across eight New York City scenarios and ten seeds, the spatial gate reduces mean wait to 82.3s, compared with 85.3s for hand-tuned similarity and 85.8s for a distributional-only baseline. In a separate replay-demand controller comparison, a scenario chance-MPC analog and a share-target transportation LP improve on Wen-style rebalancing (92.2s/92.2s vs. 100.1s), a reduced GPR chance-MPC comparator is intermediate at 94.4s, and an oracle MPC diagnostic is 91.3s.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种校准-预测-优化框架，通过空间队列-遗憾分解和泄漏安全相似门控，提升网约车车队重定位效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 网约车和自动驾驶出行服务中，在需求完全观测前重新定位空闲车辆是提升效率的关键，但现有方法在需求预测与车队控制之间缺乏校准，导致供需匹配不佳。
analysis.problem: 如何利用历史需求模式校准当前需求预测，并设计稳定的车队平衡控制器以减少乘客等待时间。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出检索校准的预测-优化方法：首先通过泄漏安全相似门控匹配历史需求模式，结合校准需求先验；然后开发空间队列-遗憾分解，将需求场误差与等待时间通过排队灵敏度、分配器灵敏度和Wasserstein拾取不匹配联系起来；最后将校准需求传递给车队平衡控制器。
contributions: 提出泄漏安全相似门控，其目标函数同时惩罚需求误差、拾取空间不匹配和队列短缺风险。
开发空间队列-遗憾分解，为稳定的排队代理提供理论链接。
在纽约市八个场景的模拟中验证了方法，平均等待时间降至82.3秒，优于基线。
analysis.experiments: 在纽约市八个场景和十个随机种子上进行模拟实验，比较了多种基线。校准需求门控实验中，空间门控平均等待时间82.3秒，优于手工调整相似度（85.3秒）和仅分布基线（85.8秒）。在单独的重放需求控制器比较中，场景机会MPC和共享目标运输LP达到92.2秒，优于Wen式重平衡（100.1秒），简化GPR机会MPC为94.4秒，Oracle MPC诊断91.3秒。
limitations: 实验仅在模拟环境中进行，未在真实网约车平台验证。
方法依赖历史需求模式的分段匹配，可能对非平稳需求适应性有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种校准-预测-优化框架，通过空间队列-遗憾分解和泄漏安全相似门控，提升网约车车队重定位效率。

papers.title: Enhancing behavioral nudges with large language model-based iterative personalization: A field experiment on electricity and hot-water conservation
papers.abstract: Nudging is widely used to promote behavioral change, but its effectiveness is often limited when recipients must repeatedly translate feedback into workable next steps under changing circumstances. Large language models (LLMs) may help reduce part of this cognitive work by generating personalized guidance and updating it iteratively across intervention rounds. We developed an LLM agent for iterative personalization and tested it in a three-arm randomized experiment among 233 university residents in China, using daily electricity and shower hot-water conservation as objectively measured cases differing in friction. LLM-personalized nudges (T2) produced the largest conservation effects, while image-enhanced conventional nudges (T1) and text-based conventional nudges (C) showed similar outcomes (omnibus p = 0.009). Relative to C, T2 reduced electricity consumption by 0.56 kWh per room-day (p = 0.014), corresponding to an 18.3 percentage-point higher adjusted saving rate. This advantage emerged within the first two intervention rounds, alongside iterative updating of personalized guidance, and persisted thereafter. Hot-water outcomes followed the same direction but were smaller, less precisely estimated, and attenuated over time, consistent with stronger friction in this domain. LLM-personalized nudges emphasized prospective and context-specific guidance and were associated with higher participant engagement. This study provides field evidence that LLM-based iterative personalization can enhance behavioral nudging, with behavioral friction as a potential boundary condition. Larger trials and extension to more behaviors are warranted.

analysis.tldr: LLM迭代个性化提示在节电和节水行为干预中优于传统提示，效果受行为摩擦影响。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统行为助推（nudging）在需要反复将反馈转化为可行步骤时效果有限，LLM可减少认知负担，但缺乏现场实验验证。
analysis.problem: 如何利用LLM生成个性化提示并迭代更新，以提升行为干预效果，并探究行为摩擦的调节作用。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM个性化提示（T2）在节电上效果显著，节水效果较弱且随时间衰减，表明行为摩擦是边界条件。
analysis.method: 开发LLM代理进行迭代个性化提示，在三臂随机实验中对比LLM个性化提示、图像增强传统提示和纯文本传统提示。
contributions: 首次通过现场实验验证LLM迭代个性化可增强行为助推效果。
揭示行为摩擦作为边界条件影响干预效果。
analysis.experiments: 在233名中国大学居民中进行三臂随机实验，以每日电力和淋浴热水节约为客观测量案例，持续多轮干预。
limitations: 样本量较小且局限于大学居民，可能限制泛化性。
节水效果不显著且随时间衰减，需更大规模试验验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM迭代个性化提示在节电和节水行为干预中优于传统提示，效果受行为摩擦影响。

papers.title: Learning 3D Reconstruction with Priors in Test Time
papers.abstract: We introduce a test-time framework for multiview Transformers (MVTs) that incorporates priors (e.g., camera poses, intrinsics, and depth) to improve 3D tasks without retraining or modifying pre-trained image-only networks. Rather than feeding priors into the architecture, we cast them as constraints on the predictions and optimize the network at inference time. The optimization loss consists of a self-supervised objective and prior penalty terms. The self-supervised objective captures the compatibility among multi-view predictions and is implemented using photometric or geometric loss between renderings from other views and each view itself. Any available priors are converted into penalty terms on the corresponding output modalities. Across a series of 3D vision benchmarks, including point map estimation and camera pose estimation, our method consistently improves performance over base MVTs by a large margin. On the ETH3D, 7-Scenes, and NRGBD datasets, our method reduces the point-map distance error by more than half compared with the base image-only models. Our method also outperforms retrained prior-aware feed-forward methods, demonstrating the effectiveness of our test-time constrained optimization (TCO) framework for incorporating priors into 3D vision tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出测试时约束优化框架，将先验信息作为约束条件融入多视图Transformer，无需重新训练即可显著提升3D重建性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有3D重建方法通常需要将先验信息（如相机位姿、深度）嵌入网络架构，导致模型必须重新训练或修改，缺乏灵活性。
analysis.problem: 如何在不重新训练或修改预训练图像网络的前提下，将先验信息有效融入多视图Transformer以提升3D任务性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出测试时约束优化（TCO）框架，将先验信息转化为预测约束，通过自监督损失（光度/几何一致性）和先验惩罚项联合优化网络输出。
contributions: 提出无需重新训练即可融入先验的测试时优化框架
在多个3D基准上显著降低点图距离误差（超过50%）
analysis.experiments: 在ETH3D、7-Scenes、NRGBD数据集上评估点图估计和相机位姿估计任务，点图距离误差降低超过50%，且优于重新训练的先验感知前馈方法。
limitations: 测试时优化可能增加推理时间
依赖先验信息的准确性和可用性
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出测试时约束优化框架，将先验信息作为约束条件融入多视图Transformer，无需重新训练即可显著提升3D重建性能。

papers.title: When Models Know More Than They Say: Probing Analogical Reasoning in LLMs
papers.abstract: Analogical reasoning is a core cognitive faculty essential for narrative understanding. While LLMs perform well when surface and structural cues align, they struggle in cases where an analogy is not apparent on the surface but requires latent information, suggesting limitations in abstraction and generalisation. In this paper we compare a model's probed representations with its prompted performance at detecting narrative analogies, revealing an asymmetry: for rhetorical analogies, probing significantly outperforms prompting in open-source models, while for narrative analogies, they achieve a similar (low) performance. This suggests that the relationship between internal representations and prompted behavior is task-dependent and may reflect limitations in how prompting accesses available information.

analysis.tldr: LLM在叙事类比推理中，探测内部表征的效果优于直接提示，表明模型知道的信息比它能说出来的多。
analysis.research_motivation: 类比推理是叙事理解的核心认知能力，但现有LLM在表面线索不明显时表现不佳，提示方法可能无法充分访问模型内部知识。
analysis.problem: 探究LLM在叙事类比推理中，内部表征与提示行为之间的不对称性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 对于修辞类比，探测显著优于提示；对于叙事类比，两者性能均低。表明任务类型影响内部表征与提示行为的关系。
analysis.method: 通过探测（probing）模型内部表征与直接提示（prompting）两种方式，比较LLM在检测叙事类比和修辞类比时的表现。
contributions: 揭示了LLM在类比推理中内部表征与提示行为之间的不对称性。
表明探测方法能更好地获取模型在修辞类比上的知识，而叙事类比仍具挑战。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅针对特定类型的类比（叙事和修辞），可能不适用于其他类比形式。
未深入分析探测方法为何优于提示，以及如何改进提示策略。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM在叙事类比推理中，探测内部表征的效果优于直接提示，表明模型知道的信息比它能说出来的多。

papers.title: Training a Student Expert via Semi-Supervised Foundation Model Distillation
papers.abstract: Foundation models deliver strong perception but are often too computationally heavy to deploy, and adapting them typically requires costly annotations. We introduce a semi-supervised knowledge distillation (SSKD) framework that compresses pre-trained vision foundation models (VFMs) into compact experts using limited labeled and abundant unlabeled data, and instantiate it for instance segmentation where per-pixel labels are particularly expensive. The framework unfolds in three stages: (1) domain adaptation of the VFM(s) via self-training with contrastive calibration, (2) knowledge transfer through a unified multi-objective loss, and (3) student refinement to mitigate residual pseudo-label bias. Central to our approach is an instance-aware pixel-wise contrastive loss that fuses mask and class scores to extract informative negatives and enforce clear inter-instance margins. By maintaining this contrastive signal across both adaptation and distillation, we align teacher and student embeddings and more effectively leverage unlabeled images. On Cityscapes and ADE20K, our $\approx 11\times$ smaller student improves over its zero-shot VFM teacher(s) by +11.9 and +8.6 AP, surpasses adapted teacher(s) by +3.4 and +1.5 AP, and outperforms state-of-the-art SSKD methods on benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: 半监督知识蒸馏框架将视觉基础模型压缩为轻量专家，在实例分割上超越教师模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 视觉基础模型性能强但计算量大难以部署，且适配需要昂贵标注，因此需要高效的模型压缩方法。
analysis.problem: 如何利用少量标注数据和大量无标注数据，将预训练视觉基础模型蒸馏为紧凑的专家模型，并提升实例分割性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出三阶段半监督知识蒸馏框架：1) 通过对比校准自训练进行域适应；2) 通过统一多目标损失进行知识迁移；3) 学生模型精炼以缓解伪标签偏差。核心是实例感知的像素级对比损失，融合掩码和类别分数以提取信息负样本并强制实例间边界。
contributions: 提出半监督知识蒸馏框架，有效压缩视觉基础模型为轻量专家。
设计实例感知像素级对比损失，在域适应和蒸馏中保持对比信号，提升无标注数据利用效率。
analysis.experiments: 在Cityscapes和ADE20K数据集上，约11倍小的学生模型在实例分割上比零样本教师提升+11.9和+8.6 AP，比适配教师提升+3.4和+1.5 AP，并超越现有半监督知识蒸馏方法。
limitations: 框架复杂度较高，三阶段训练可能增加训练时间。
方法在实例分割上验证，其他任务（如语义分割、检测）的泛化性未明确。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 半监督知识蒸馏框架将视觉基础模型压缩为轻量专家，在实例分割上超越教师模型。

papers.title: Beyond Task-Driven Features for Object Detection
papers.abstract: Task-driven features learned by modern object detectors optimize end task loss yet often capture shortcut correlations that fail to reflect underlying annotation structure. Such representations limit transfer, interpretability, and robustness when task definitions change or supervision becomes sparse. This paper introduces an annotation-guided feature augmentation framework that injects embeddings into an object detection backbone. The method constructs dense spatial feature grids from annotation-guided latent spaces and fuses them with feature pyramid representations to influence region proposal and detection heads. Experiments across wildlife and remote sensing datasets evaluate classification, localization, and data efficiency under multiple supervision regimes. Results show consistent improvements in object focus, reduced background sensitivity, and stronger generalization to unseen or weakly supervised tasks. The findings demonstrate that aligning features with annotation geometry yields more meaningful representations than purely task optimized features.

analysis.tldr: 通过注入标注引导的嵌入，使目标检测器学到更关注物体结构、减少背景干扰的特征，提升泛化与弱监督能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现代目标检测器学习到的任务驱动特征常捕获捷径相关，无法反映底层标注结构，限制了迁移性、可解释性和鲁棒性。
analysis.problem: 如何使目标检测器的特征表示更好地对齐标注几何结构，而非仅优化端到端任务损失。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 任务驱动特征存在捷径相关，对背景敏感，泛化到未见或弱监督任务时表现不佳。
analysis.method: 提出标注引导的特征增强框架，将标注引导的潜在空间嵌入注入检测骨干，构建密集空间特征网格，与特征金字塔融合以影响区域提议和检测头。
contributions: 提出一种标注引导的特征增强方法，使特征对齐标注几何结构。
在野生动物和遥感数据集上验证了该方法在目标聚焦、背景敏感性和泛化能力上的提升。
analysis.experiments: 在野生动物和遥感数据集上评估分类、定位和数据效率，结果显示在目标聚焦、减少背景敏感性和泛化到未见/弱监督任务上有一致改进。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的标注信息。
在复杂场景或密集目标下的效果未在摘要中明确。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过注入标注引导的嵌入，使目标检测器学到更关注物体结构、减少背景干扰的特征，提升泛化与弱监督能力。

papers.title: Task-Guided Multi-Annotation Triplet Learning for Remote Sensing Representations
papers.abstract: Prior multi-task triplet loss methods relied on static weights to balance supervision between various types of annotation. However, static weighting requires tuning and does not account for how tasks interact when shaping a shared representation. To address this, the proposed task-guided multi-annotation triplet loss removes this dependency by selecting triplets through a mutual-information criteria that identifies triplets most informative across tasks. This strategy modifies which samples influence the representation rather than adjusting loss magnitudes. Experiments on an aerial wildlife dataset compare the proposed task-guided selection against several triplet loss setups for shaping a representation in an effective multi-task manner. The results show improved classification and regression performance and demonstrate that task-aware triplet selection produces a more effective shared representation for downstream tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出任务引导的多标注三元组损失，通过互信息选择跨任务信息量最大的三元组，提升遥感表征学习效果。
analysis.research_motivation: 多任务三元组损失方法依赖静态权重平衡不同标注类型的监督，但静态权重需要调参且无法捕捉任务交互对共享表征的影响。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖静态权重的情况下，通过任务感知的三元组选择来学习更有效的共享表征。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出任务引导的多标注三元组损失，使用互信息准则选择跨任务信息量最大的三元组，而非调整损失幅度。
contributions: 提出任务引导的多标注三元组损失，消除静态权重依赖
通过互信息选择跨任务信息量最大的三元组，提升共享表征质量
analysis.experiments: 在航空野生动物数据集上，与多种三元组损失设置对比，分类和回归性能提升。
limitations: 仅在一个数据集上验证，泛化性未知
互信息计算可能带来额外计算开销
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出任务引导的多标注三元组损失，通过互信息选择跨任务信息量最大的三元组，提升遥感表征学习效果。

papers.title: Cost-Efficient Multi-Scale Fovea for Semantic-Based Visual Search Attention
papers.abstract: Semantics are one of the primary sources of top-down preattentive information. Modern deep object detectors excel at extracting such valuable semantic cues from complex visual scenes. However, the size of the visual input to be processed by these detectors can become a bottleneck, particularly in terms of time costs, affecting an artificial attention system's biological plausibility and real-time deployability. Inspired by classical exponential density roll-off topologies, we apply a new artificial foveation module to our novel attention prediction pipeline: the Semantic-based Bayesian Attention (SemBA) framework. We aim at reducing detection-related computational costs without compromising visual task accuracy, thereby making SemBA more biologically plausible. The proposed multi-scale pyramidal field-of-view retains maximum acuity at an innermost level, around a focal point, while gradually increasing distortion for outer levels to mimic peripheral uncertainty via downsampling. In this work we evaluate the performance of our novel Multi-Scale Fovea, incorporated into SemBA, on target-present visual search. We also compare it against other artificial foveal systems, and conduct ablation studies with different deep object detection models to assess the impact of the new topology in terms of computational costs. We experimentally demonstrate that including the new Multi-Scale Fovea module effectively reduces inherent processing costs while improving SemBA's scanpath prediction accuracy. Remarkably, we show that SemBA closely approximates human consistency while retaining the actual human fovea's proportions.

analysis.tldr: 提出多尺度中央凹模块降低视觉搜索计算成本，提升生物合理性与预测精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 视觉搜索中深度检测器处理大尺寸输入耗时高，影响生物合理性与实时部署。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲视觉任务精度的前提下降低语义驱动注意力系统的计算成本。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在SemBA框架中引入多尺度金字塔视野中央凹模块，中心保持高分辨率，外围通过降采样模拟周边不确定性。
contributions: 提出多尺度中央凹模块，降低计算成本并提升扫描路径预测精度。
实验证明该方法接近人类一致性，并保留真实中央凹比例。
analysis.experiments: 在目标存在视觉搜索任务上评估，与其他人造中央凹系统比较，并针对不同深度检测模型进行消融研究。
limitations: 可能仅适用于目标存在搜索场景。
未讨论在复杂动态场景中的泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多尺度中央凹模块降低视觉搜索计算成本，提升生物合理性与预测精度。

papers.title: SPARK-IL: Spectral Retrieval-Augmented RAG for Knowledge-driven Deepfake Detection via Incremental Learning
papers.abstract: Detecting AI-generated images remains a significant challenge because detectors trained on specific generators often fail to generalize to unseen models; however, while pixel-level artifacts vary across models, frequency-domain signatures exhibit greater consistency, providing a promising foundation for cross-generator detection. To address this, we propose SPARK-IL, a retrieval-augmented framework that combines dual-path spectral analysis with incremental learning by utilizing a partially frozen ViT-L/14 encoder for semantic representations alongside a parallel path for raw RGB pixel embeddings. Both paths undergo multi-band Fourier decomposition into four frequency bands, which are individually processed by Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks (KAN) with mixture-of-experts for band-specific transformations before the resulting spectral embeddings are fused via cross-attention with residual connections. During inference, this fused embedding retrieves the $k$ nearest labeled signatures from a Milvus database using cosine similarity to facilitate predictions via majority voting, while an incremental learning strategy expands the database and employs elastic weight consolidation to preserve previously learned transformations. Evaluated on the UniversalFakeDetect benchmark across 19 generative models -- including GANs, face-swapping, and diffusion methods -- SPARK-IL achieves a 94.6\% mean accuracy, with the code to be publicly released at https://github.com/HessenUPHF/SPARK-IL.

analysis.tldr: 提出SPARK-IL，结合频谱检索增强与增量学习，利用频域一致性实现跨生成器深度伪造检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有深度伪造检测器在未见过的生成模型上泛化能力差，而频域特征比像素级伪影更具一致性，为跨生成器检测提供了新思路。
analysis.problem: 如何利用频域一致性和增量学习提升深度伪造检测的跨生成器泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出像素级伪影随生成模型变化，而频域特征具有更大一致性，这是方法设计的核心观察。
analysis.method: 双路径频谱分析（语义+RGB）经多频带傅里叶分解，由KAN网络处理，融合后通过检索最近邻标签进行多数投票预测，并采用增量学习（弹性权重巩固）扩展数据库。
contributions: 提出结合频谱检索增强与增量学习的深度伪造检测框架SPARK-IL。
在19种生成模型上达到94.6%平均准确率，验证了频域一致性的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在UniversalFakeDetect基准上评估，涵盖GAN、换脸、扩散等19种生成模型，平均准确率94.6%。
limitations: 依赖预定义频带分解，可能不适用于所有生成模型。
增量学习策略可能受限于数据库规模。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SPARK-IL，结合频谱检索增强与增量学习，利用频域一致性实现跨生成器深度伪造检测。

papers.title: Squeez: Task-Conditioned Tool-Output Pruning for Coding Agents
papers.abstract: Coding agents repeatedly consume long tool observations even though only a small fraction of each observation matters for the next step. We study task-conditioned tool-output pruning: given a focused query and one tool output, return the smallest verbatim evidence block the agent should inspect next. We introduce a benchmark of 11,477 examples built from SWE-bench repository interactions and synthetic multi-ecosystem tool outputs, with a manually curated 618-example test set. We fine-tune Qwen 3.5 2B with LoRA and compare it against larger zero-shot models and heuristic pruning baselines. Our model reaches 0.86 recall and 0.80 F1 while removing 92% of input tokens, outperforming zero-shot Qwen 3.5 35B A3B by 11 recall points and all heuristic baselines by a wide margin.

analysis.tldr: 提出任务条件工具输出剪枝方法，用小型微调模型高效压缩编码Agent的上下文。
analysis.research_motivation: 编码Agent在每一步中消耗大量工具输出，但其中只有一小部分对下一步决策有用，导致计算浪费和上下文过长。
analysis.problem: 如何根据当前查询从工具输出中提取最精简的证据块，以减少Agent处理的token数量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建包含11,477个示例的基准数据集，基于SWE-bench仓库交互和合成多生态系统工具输出，并人工整理618个测试样本；使用LoRA微调Qwen 3.5 2B模型，实现任务条件剪枝。
contributions: 提出任务条件工具输出剪枝问题并构建相应基准数据集
微调小模型在剪枝任务上超越大模型零样本和启发式基线
analysis.experiments: 在618个测试样本上，模型达到0.86召回率和0.80 F1，同时移除92%的输入token，优于零样本Qwen 3.5 35B A3B（高11个召回点）和所有启发式基线。
limitations: 基准数据集规模有限，可能无法覆盖所有真实场景
仅针对编码Agent，泛化性未验证
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出任务条件工具输出剪枝方法，用小型微调模型高效压缩编码Agent的上下文。

papers.title: Affording Process Auditability with QualAnalyzer: An Atomistic LLM Analysis Tool for Qualitative Research
papers.abstract: Large language models are increasingly used for qualitative data analysis, but many workflows obscure how analytic conclusions are produced. We present QualAnalyzer, an open-source Chrome extension for Google Workspace that supports atomistic LLM analysis by processing each data segment independently and preserving the prompt, input, and output for every unit. Through two case studies -- holistic essay scoring and deductive thematic coding of interview transcripts -- we show that this approach creates a legible audit trail and helps researchers investigate systematic differences between LLM and human judgments. We argue that process auditability is essential for making LLM-assisted qualitative research more transparent and methodologically robust.

analysis.tldr: QualAnalyzer通过原子化LLM分析实现定性研究的过程可审计性。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在定性数据分析中应用广泛，但许多工作流程掩盖了分析结论的产生过程，导致透明度不足和方法论脆弱。
analysis.problem: 如何使LLM辅助的定性分析过程可审计，以增强透明度和方法论稳健性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 开发开源Chrome扩展QualAnalyzer，对每个数据段独立进行LLM分析，并保留每单元的提示、输入和输出，形成可读的审计轨迹。
contributions: 提出QualAnalyzer工具，实现原子化LLM分析并保留完整审计轨迹。
通过两个案例研究展示该方法在帮助研究者调查LLM与人类判断的系统性差异方面的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 通过两个案例研究（整体论文评分和演绎主题编码）进行验证，摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于Google Workspace环境。
原子化分析可能增加人工审查负担。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: QualAnalyzer通过原子化LLM分析实现定性研究的过程可审计性。

papers.title: ActivityForensics: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Localizing Manipulated Activity in Videos
papers.abstract: Temporal forgery localization aims to temporally identify manipulated segments in videos. Most existing benchmarks focus on appearance-level forgeries, such as face swapping and object removal. However, recent advances in video generation have driven the emergence of activity-level forgeries that modify human actions to distort event semantics, resulting in highly deceptive forgeries that critically undermine media authenticity and public trust. To overcome this issue, we introduce ActivityForensics, the first large-scale benchmark for localizing manipulated activity in videos. It contains over 6K forged video segments that are seamlessly blended into the video context, rendering high visual consistency that makes them almost indistinguishable from authentic content to the human eye. We further propose Temporal Artifact Diffuser (TADiff), a simple yet effective baseline that exposes artifact cues through a diffusion-based feature regularizer. Based on ActivityForensics, we introduce comprehensive evaluation protocols covering intra-domain, cross-domain, and open-world settings, and benchmark a wide range of state-of-the-art forgery localizers to facilitate future research. The dataset and code are available at https://activityforensics.github.io.

analysis.tldr: 首个针对视频中活动级伪造定位的大规模基准与扩散特征正则化基线方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频伪造定位基准主要关注外观级伪造（如换脸、物体移除），但视频生成技术的进步催生了活动级伪造（修改人类动作以扭曲事件语义），这类伪造高度逼真，严重威胁媒体真实性和公众信任，而现有方法难以应对。
analysis.problem: 缺乏针对视频中活动级伪造（activity-level forgeries）的定位基准和有效检测方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 活动级伪造通过修改人类动作扭曲事件语义，具有高视觉一致性，人眼几乎无法区分。
analysis.method: 提出Temporal Artifact Diffuser (TADiff)，一种基于扩散特征正则化器的简单有效基线，用于暴露伪造伪影。
contributions: 构建ActivityForensics，首个大规模活动级伪造定位基准，包含超过6000个伪造视频片段，无缝融入视频上下文。
提出TADiff基线方法，利用扩散特征正则化暴露伪造伪影。
设计全面的评估协议（域内、跨域、开放世界），并基准测试多种现有伪造定位方法。
analysis.experiments: 在ActivityForensics基准上进行了域内、跨域和开放世界设置下的全面评估，并对比了多种最先进伪造定位方法。
limitations: TADiff作为简单基线，性能可能不如更复杂的方法。
基准仅覆盖活动级伪造，未涉及其他类型伪造。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个针对视频中活动级伪造定位的大规模基准与扩散特征正则化基线方法。

papers.title: Measuring the Permission Gate: A Stress-Test Evaluation of Claude Code's Auto Mode
papers.abstract: Claude Code's auto mode is the first deployed permission system for AI coding agents, using a two-stage transcript classifier to gate dangerous tool calls. Anthropic reports a 0.4% false positive rate and 17% false negative rate on production traffic. We present the first independent evaluation of this system on deliberately ambiguous authorization scenarios, i.e., tasks where the user's intent is clear but the target scope, blast radius, or risk level is underspecified. Using AmPermBench, a 128-prompt benchmark spanning four DevOps task families and three controlled ambiguity axes, we evaluate 253 state-changing actions at the individual action level against oracle ground truth. Our findings characterize auto mode's scope-escalation coverage under this stress-test workload. The end-to-end false negative rate is 81.0% (95% CI: 73.8%-87.4%), substantially higher than the 17% reported on production traffic, reflecting a fundamentally different workload rather than a contradiction. Notably, 36.8% of all state-changing actions fall outside the classifier's scope via Tier 2 (in-project file edits), contributing to the elevated end-to-end FNR. Even restricting to the 160 actions the classifier actually evaluates (Tier 3), the FNR remains 70.3%, while the FPR rises to 31.9%. The Tier 2 coverage gap is most pronounced on artifact cleanup (92.9% FNR), where agents naturally fall back to editing state files when the expected CLI is unavailable. These results highlight a coverage boundary worth examining: auto mode assumes dangerous actions transit the shell, but agents routinely achieve equivalent effects through file edits that the classifier does not evaluate.

analysis.tldr: 对Claude Code自动模式的首次独立压力测试发现，其权限门控在模糊授权场景下漏报率高达81%，远高于官方报告的17%。
analysis.research_motivation: AI编码代理的权限系统是保障安全的关键，但现有系统缺乏独立评估，尤其是在用户意图明确但授权范围模糊的复杂场景下，其实际效果未知。
analysis.problem: 评估Claude Code自动模式在故意模糊的授权场景（即用户意图明确但目标范围、爆炸半径或风险级别未明确指定）下的权限门控性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：在压力测试工作负载下，端到端假阴性率（81.0%）远高于生产流量报告值（17%），主要原因是大量状态改变操作（36.8%）通过Tier 2（项目内文件编辑）绕过分类器范围；即使仅考虑分类器实际评估的Tier 3操作，假阴性率仍高达70.3%，假阳性率升至31.9%。
analysis.method: 构建包含128个提示的基准AmPermBench，覆盖四个DevOps任务族和三个受控模糊性轴，在单个动作级别评估253个状态改变操作，并与Oracle真实标签对比。
contributions: 首次对Claude Code自动模式进行独立评估，揭示了其在模糊授权场景下的性能瓶颈。
构建了AmPermBench基准，用于系统性地测试AI编码代理的权限门控系统。
量化了Tier 2覆盖缺口，指出自动模式假设危险操作通过shell，但代理可通过文件编辑实现等效效果。
analysis.experiments: 摘要提供了具体实验结果：端到端假阴性率81.0%（95% CI: 73.8%-87.4%），Tier 2覆盖缺口导致36.8%动作未被评估，Tier 3假阴性率70.3%，假阳性率31.9%。
limitations: 基准规模有限（128个提示，253个动作），可能无法覆盖所有真实场景。
评估仅针对Claude Code自动模式，结论可能不适用于其他权限系统。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 对Claude Code自动模式的首次独立压力测试发现，其权限门控在模糊授权场景下漏报率高达81%，远高于官方报告的17%。

papers.title: k-Maximum Inner Product Attention for Graph Transformers and the Expressive Power of GraphGPS
papers.abstract: Graph transformers have shown promise in overcoming limitations of traditional graph neural networks, such as oversquashing and difficulties in modeling long-range dependencies. However, their application to large-scale graphs is hindered by the quadratic memory and computational complexity of the all-to-all attention mechanism. Although alternatives such as linearized attention and restricted attention patterns have been proposed, these often degrade performance or limit expressive power. To better balance efficiency and effectiveness, we introduce k-Maximum Inner Product (k-MIP) attention for graph transformers. k-MIP attention selects the most relevant key nodes per query via a top-k operation, yielding a sparse yet flexible attention pattern. Combined with an attention score computation based on symbolic matrices, this results in linear memory complexity and practical speedups of up to an order of magnitude compared to all-to-all attention, enabling the processing of graphs with over 500k nodes on a single A100 GPU. We provide a theoretical analysis of expressive power, showing that k-MIP attention does not compromise the expressiveness of graph transformers: specifically, we prove that k-MIP transformers can approximate any full-attention transformer to arbitrary precision. In addition, we analyze the expressive power of the GraphGPS framework, in which we integrate our attention mechanism, and establish an upper bound on its graph distinguishing capability in terms of the S-SEG-WL test. Finally, we validate our approach on the Long Range Graph Benchmark, the City-Networks benchmark, and two custom large-scale inductive point cloud datasets, consistently ranking among the top-performing scalable graph transformers.

analysis.tldr: 提出k-MIP注意力机制，实现图Transformer线性复杂度且不损失表达能力，支持50万节点图处理。
analysis.research_motivation: 图Transformer受限于全注意力的二次复杂度，难以扩展到大规模图；现有线性化或受限注意力模式常牺牲性能或表达能力。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种稀疏、灵活且高效的图注意力机制，在保持全注意力表达能力的同时实现线性复杂度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出k-MIP注意力，通过top-k操作为每个查询选择最相关的键节点，结合符号矩阵计算注意力分数，实现线性内存复杂度。
contributions: 提出k-MIP注意力机制，实现线性内存复杂度和实际加速（最高一个数量级），支持50万节点图。
理论证明k-MIP Transformer可以任意精度逼近全注意力Transformer，且分析GraphGPS框架的表达能力上界。
在长程图基准、城市网络基准和两个大规模点云数据集上取得与顶尖可扩展图Transformer相当的性能。
analysis.experiments: 在Long Range Graph Benchmark、City-Networks benchmark和两个自定义大规模点云数据集上验证，性能排名靠前。
limitations: top-k操作可能引入额外计算开销，需进一步优化。
理论分析限于逼近能力，未讨论泛化性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on graphs and other geometries & topologies
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出k-MIP注意力机制，实现图Transformer线性复杂度且不损失表达能力，支持50万节点图处理。

papers.title: InCaRPose: In-Cabin Relative Camera Pose Estimation Model and Dataset
papers.abstract: Camera extrinsic calibration is a fundamental task in computer vision. However, precise relative pose estimation in constrained, highly distorted environments, such as in-cabin automotive monitoring (ICAM), remains challenging. We present InCaRPose, a Transformer-based architecture designed for robust relative pose prediction between image pairs, which can be used for camera extrinsic calibration. By leveraging frozen backbone features such as DINOv3 and a Transformer-based decoder, our model effectively captures the geometric relationship between a reference and a target view. Unlike traditional methods, our approach achieves absolute metric-scale translation within the physically plausible adjustment range of in-cabin camera mounts in a single inference step, which is critical for ICAM, where accurate real-world distances are required for safety-relevant perception. We specifically address the challenges of highly distorted fisheye cameras in automotive interiors by training exclusively on synthetic data. Our model is capable of generalization to real-world cabin environments without relying on the exact same camera intrinsics and additionally achieves competitive performance on the public 7-Scenes dataset. Despite having limited training data, InCaRPose maintains high precision in both rotation and translation, even with a ViT-Small backbone. This enables real-time performance for time-critical inference, such as driver monitoring in supervised autonomous driving. We release our real-world In-Cabin-Pose test dataset consisting of highly distorted vehicle-interior images and our code at https://github.com/felixstillger/InCaRPose.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于Transformer的InCaRPose模型和车内相机位姿数据集，实现单步绝对尺度平移估计。
analysis.research_motivation: 车内监控等受限高畸变环境中，传统相机外参标定方法难以精确估计相对位姿，且需要精确内参或多次迭代。
analysis.problem: 在车内高畸变鱼眼相机环境下，实现鲁棒的相对相机位姿预测，并直接输出绝对尺度平移。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于Transformer架构，使用冻结的DINOv3骨干提取特征，通过Transformer解码器学习参考视图与目标视图的几何关系，单步推理输出绝对度量平移。
contributions: 提出InCaRPose模型，专为车内高畸变环境设计，单步输出绝对尺度平移。
发布真实车内位姿测试数据集In-Cabin-Pose，包含高畸变图像。
analysis.experiments: 在合成数据上训练，泛化到真实车内环境，并在7-Scenes数据集上取得竞争性能。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 仅基于合成数据训练，真实场景泛化能力可能受限。
依赖DINOv3等预训练特征，可能受限于特征提取器的能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于Transformer的InCaRPose模型和车内相机位姿数据集，实现单步绝对尺度平移估计。

papers.title: Representational Collapse in Multi-Agent LLM Committees: Measurement and Diversity-Aware Consensus
papers.abstract: Multi-agent LLM committees replicate the same model under different role prompts and aggregate outputs by majority vote, implicitly assuming that agents contribute complementary evidence. We embed each agent's chain-of-thought rationale and measure pairwise similarity: across 100 GSM8K questions with three Qwen2.5-14B agents, mean cosine similarity is 0.888 and effective rank is 2.17 out of 3.0, a failure mode we term representational collapse. DALC, a training-free consensus protocol that computes diversity weights from embedding geometry, reaches 87% on GSM8K versus 84% for self-consistency at 26% lower token cost. Ablation experiments reveal 1-3 point per-protocol run-to-run variance, confirm that hint sharing contributes more than diversity weighting alone, and show that encoder choice strongly modulates collapse severity (cosine 0.908 with mxbai versus 0.888 with nomic) and downstream accuracy. The more robust finding is that collapse is measurable, worsens on harder tasks, and that the choice of embedding proxy is a first-order design decision for any latent communication protocol.

analysis.tldr: 多智能体LLM委员会存在表征坍缩问题，DALC协议通过多样性加权提升性能并降低开销。
analysis.research_motivation: 多智能体LLM委员会假设不同角色提示下的智能体提供互补证据，但实际中可能产生冗余表征，导致投票效率低下。
analysis.problem: 多智能体LLM委员会中表征坍缩的量化与缓解。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到多智能体LLM委员会中表征高度相似（余弦相似度0.888，有效秩2.17/3.0），即表征坍缩；坍缩在更难任务上更严重，且编码器选择显著影响坍缩程度和下游准确率。
analysis.method: 提出DALC（多样性感知共识）协议，基于嵌入几何计算多样性权重，无需训练即可聚合输出。
contributions: 定义并量化了多智能体LLM委员会中的表征坍缩现象。
提出DALC协议，通过多样性加权提升准确率并降低token成本。
analysis.experiments: 在GSM8K数据集上使用三个Qwen2.5-14B智能体进行实验，DALC达到87%准确率，优于自一致性（84%），且token成本降低26%；消融实验显示提示共享贡献大于多样性加权，编码器选择影响坍缩严重性。
limitations: 仅测试了单一数据集和模型系列，泛化性未知。
DALC依赖嵌入几何，可能受编码器质量影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 多智能体LLM委员会存在表征坍缩问题，DALC协议通过多样性加权提升性能并降低开销。

papers.title: Bridging Restoration and Diagnosis: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Retinal Fundus Enhancement
papers.abstract: Over the past decade, generative models have demonstrated success in enhancing fundus images. However, the evaluation of these models remains a challenge. A benchmark for fundus image enhancement is needed for three main reasons:(1) Conventional denoising metrics such as PSNR and SSIM fail to capture clinically relevant features, such as lesion preservation and vessel morphology consistency, limiting their applicability in real-world settings; (2) There is a lack of unified evaluation protocols that address both paired and unpaired enhancement methods, particularly those guided by clinical expertise; and (3) An evaluation framework should provide actionable insights to guide future advancements in clinically aligned enhancement models. To address these gaps, we introduce EyeBench-V2, a benchmark designed to bridge the gap between enhancement model performance and clinical utility. Our work offers three key contributions:(1) Multi-dimensional clinical-alignment through downstream evaluations: Beyond standard enhancement metrics, we assess performance across clinically meaningful tasks including vessel segmentation, diabetic retinopathy (DR) grading, generalization to unseen noise patterns, and lesion segmentation. (2) Expert-guided evaluation design: We curate a novel dataset enabling fair comparisons between paired and unpaired enhancement methods, accompanied by a structured manual assessment protocol by medical experts, which evaluates clinically critical aspects such as lesion structure alterations, background color shifts, and the introduction of artificial structures. (3) Actionable insights: Our benchmark provides a rigorous, task-oriented analysis of existing generative models, equipping clinical researchers with the evidence needed to make informed decisions, while also identifying limitations in current methods to inform the design of next-generation enhancement models.

analysis.tldr: 提出眼底图像增强综合基准EyeBench-V2，通过下游临床任务评估和专家指导评测桥接图像恢复与临床诊断。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有眼底图像增强模型评估依赖PSNR/SSIM等传统指标，无法捕捉病变保留、血管形态一致性等临床相关特征，且缺乏统一评测协议和临床指导。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个能同时评估配对/非配对增强方法、并融合临床任务和专家知识的眼底图像增强基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 传统指标（PSNR/SSIM）与临床效用脱节，现有评测协议不统一，无法为临床决策和模型改进提供可操作见解。
analysis.method: 构建EyeBench-V2基准，包含多维度临床对齐评估（血管分割、DR分级、噪声泛化、病变分割）、专家引导评测协议（病变结构变化、背景色偏、人工结构引入）以及可操作见解。
contributions: 提出多维度临床对齐评估，通过下游任务衡量增强模型的临床效用。
设计专家引导的评测协议，支持配对与非配对方法公平比较。
提供可操作见解，识别现有模型局限，指导下一代增强模型设计。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 基准可能依赖特定数据集和专家标注，泛化性需验证。
临床任务评估可能受限于任务本身的性能上限。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出眼底图像增强综合基准EyeBench-V2，通过下游临床任务评估和专家指导评测桥接图像恢复与临床诊断。

papers.title: Rényi Attention Entropy for Patch Pruning
papers.abstract: Transformers are strong baselines in both vision and language because self-attention captures long-range dependencies across tokens. However, the cost of self-attention grows quadratically with the number of tokens. Patch pruning mitigates this cost by estimating per-patch importance and removing redundant patches. To identify informative patches for pruning, we introduce a criterion based on the Shannon entropy of the attention distribution. Low-entropy patches, which receive selective and concentrated attention, are kept as important, while high-entropy patches with attention spread across many locations are treated as redundant. We also extend the criterion from Shannon to Rényi entropy, which emphasizes sharp attention peaks and supports pruning strategies that adapt to task needs and computational limits. In experiments on fine-grained image recognition, where patch selection is critical, our method reduced computation while preserving accuracy. Moreover, adjusting the pruning policy through the Rényi entropy measure yields further gains and improves the trade-off between accuracy and computation.

analysis.tldr: 利用注意力熵（Shannon和Rényi）作为剪枝准则，在细粒度图像识别中减少计算量并保持精度。
analysis.research_motivation: Transformer中自注意力的计算成本随token数量二次增长，需要高效剪枝方法减少冗余patch。
analysis.problem: 如何基于注意力分布的信息量（熵）来识别并剪除冗余patch，同时保持模型性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 低熵patch接收集中注意力，保留为重要；高熵patch注意力分散，视为冗余。Rényi熵可强调尖锐注意力峰，适应不同任务和计算需求。
analysis.method: 提出基于Shannon熵的patch重要性准则，并扩展至Rényi熵以支持自适应剪枝策略。
contributions: 首次将注意力熵（Shannon和Rényi）作为patch剪枝的准则。
通过Rényi熵调整剪枝策略，在细粒度识别中实现精度-计算量权衡的改进。
analysis.experiments: 在细粒度图像识别任务上验证，剪枝后计算量减少且精度保持，Rényi熵进一步改善权衡。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 仅在细粒度图像识别上验证，泛化性未知。
未讨论与其他剪枝方法的对比或计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用注意力熵（Shannon和Rényi）作为剪枝准则，在细粒度图像识别中减少计算量并保持精度。

papers.title: HistoFusionNet: Histogram-Guided Fusion and Frequency-Adaptive Refinement for Nighttime Image Dehazing
papers.abstract: Nighttime image dehazing remains a challenging low-level vision problem due to the joint presence of haze, glow, non-uniform illumination, color distortion, and sensor noise, which often invalidate assumptions commonly used in daytime dehazing. To address these challenges, we propose HistoFusionNet, a transformer-enhanced architecture tailored for nighttime image dehazing by combining histogram-guided representation learning with frequency-adaptive feature refinement. Built upon a multi-scale encoder-decoder backbone, our method introduces histogram transformer blocks that model long-range dependencies by grouping features according to their dynamic-range characteristics, enabling more effective aggregation of similarly degraded regions under complex nighttime lighting. To further improve restoration fidelity, we incorporate a frequency-aware refinement branch that adaptively exploits complementary low- and high-frequency cues, helping recover scene structures, suppress artifacts, and enhance local details. This design yields a unified framework that is particularly well suited to the heterogeneous degradations encountered in real nighttime hazy scenes. Extensive experiments and highly competitive performance of our method on the NTIRE 2026 Nighttime Image Dehazing Challenge benchmark demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method. Our team ranked 1st among 22 participating teams, highlighting the robustness and competitive performance of HistoFusionNet. The code is available at: https://github.com/heydarimo/Night-Time-Dehazing

analysis.tldr: HistoFusionNet通过直方图引导的Transformer和频率自适应细化，在夜间图像去雾任务中取得NTIRE 2026挑战赛第一名。
analysis.research_motivation: 夜间图像去雾面临雾霾、辉光、非均匀光照、颜色失真和传感器噪声等多重退化，白天去雾方法常失效，亟需针对夜间场景的专用模型。
analysis.problem: 解决夜间有雾图像中复杂异构退化（如辉光、不均匀光照、噪声）的联合去除问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 夜间场景中不同区域的动态范围差异大，导致全局建模困难；低频和高频信息退化模式不同，需要分别处理。
analysis.method: 基于多尺度编码器-解码器，引入直方图Transformer块按动态范围分组特征建模长程依赖，并添加频率感知细化分支自适应利用互补的高低频线索。
contributions: 提出直方图引导的Transformer块，通过动态范围分组聚合相似退化区域特征。
设计频率感知细化分支，自适应融合高低频信息以恢复结构、抑制伪影并增强细节。
在NTIRE 2026夜间图像去雾挑战赛中获得第一名（22支队伍），验证了方法的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在NTIRE 2026夜间图像去雾挑战赛基准上评估，排名第一（22支参赛队伍），但摘要未提供具体量化指标。
limitations: 可能对极端光照或严重噪声场景泛化能力有限。
计算复杂度可能较高，影响实时应用。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: HistoFusionNet通过直方图引导的Transformer和频率自适应细化，在夜间图像去雾任务中取得NTIRE 2026挑战赛第一名。

papers.title: Next-Scale Autoregressive Models for Text-to-Motion Generation
papers.abstract: Autoregressive (AR) models offer stable and efficient training, but standard next-token prediction is not well aligned with the temporal structure required for text-conditioned motion generation. We introduce MoScale, a next-scale AR framework that generates motion hierarchically from coarse to fine temporal resolutions. By providing global semantics at the coarsest scale and refining them progressively, MoScale establishes a causal hierarchy better suited for long-range motion structure. To improve robustness under limited text-motion data, we further incorporate cross-scale hierarchical refinement for improving per-scale initial predictions and in-scale temporal refinement for selective bidirectional re-prediction. MoScale achieves SOTA text-to-motion performance with high training efficiency, scales effectively with model size, and generalizes zero-shot to diverse motion generation and editing tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出MoScale，一种从粗到细分层生成动作的下一尺度自回归框架，在文本到动作生成任务上达到SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准自回归模型的逐token预测方式与文本条件动作生成所需的时间结构不匹配，难以捕捉长程运动结构。
analysis.problem: 如何设计自回归模型以更好地对齐文本条件动作生成中的时间层级结构。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准next-token预测在长程运动结构上表现不佳，而分层生成能提供全局语义并逐步细化。
analysis.method: MoScale：一种下一尺度自回归框架，从粗到细分层生成动作，包含跨尺度层级精化（改进每尺度初始预测）和尺度内时间精化（选择性双向重预测）。
contributions: 提出MoScale，首个将下一尺度自回归用于文本到动作生成的框架，实现从粗到细的分层生成。
引入跨尺度和尺度内精化机制，提升数据有限时的鲁棒性。
在多个基准上达到SOTA，训练高效，可扩展，并零样本泛化到多种动作生成和编辑任务。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但声称达到SOTA性能、高训练效率、有效扩展性及零样本泛化能力。
limitations: 可能依赖特定动作表示格式。
跨尺度精化可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MoScale，一种从粗到细分层生成动作的下一尺度自回归框架，在文本到动作生成任务上达到SOTA。

papers.title: Confidence-Driven Facade Refinement of 3D Building Models Using MLS Point Clouds
papers.abstract: Digital twins require continuous maintenance to meet the increasing demand for high-precision geospatial data. However, traditional coarse CityGML building models, typically derived from Airborne Laser Scanning (ALS), often exhibit significant geometric deficiencies, particularly regarding facade accuracy due to the nadir perspective of airborne sensors. Integrating these coarse models with high-precision Mobile Laser Scanning (MLS) data is essential to recover detailed facade geometry. Unlike reconstruction-from-scratch approaches that discard existing semantic information and rely heavily on complete data coverage, this work presents an automated refinement framework that utilizes the coarse model as a geometric prior. This method enables targeted updates to facade geometry even in complex urban environments. It integrates surface matching to identify outdated surfaces and employs a binary integer optimization to select optimal faces from candidate data. Crucially, hard constraints are enforced within the optimization to ensure the topological validity of the refined output. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed approach effectively corrects facade misalignments, reducing the Cloud-to-Mesh RMSE by approximately 36% and achieving centimeter-level alignment. Furthermore, the framework guarantees strictly watertight and manifold geometry, providing a robust solution for upgrading ALS-derived city models.

analysis.tldr: 利用MLS点云和置信度驱动的优化方法，自动修正ALS粗模的立面几何误差，实现厘米级对齐并保证拓扑有效性。
analysis.research_motivation: 数字孪生对高精度地理空间数据需求日益增长，但传统ALS粗模因天底视角导致立面几何精度不足，亟需低成本、自动化的精化方法。
analysis.problem: 如何利用高精度MLS点云自动修正ALS粗模的立面几何缺陷，同时保证输出模型的拓扑有效性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 以粗模为几何先验，通过表面匹配识别过时表面，再通过二元整数优化从候选数据中选择最优面片，并施加硬约束保证拓扑有效性。
contributions: 提出一种自动化精化框架，利用粗模作为几何先验，避免从零重建并减少对完整数据覆盖的依赖。
通过二元整数优化和拓扑硬约束，保证输出模型严格水密且流形，同时实现厘米级对齐精度。
analysis.experiments: 在真实城市数据集上验证，Cloud-to-Mesh RMSE降低约36%，达到厘米级对齐。
limitations: 可能依赖MLS点云的质量和覆盖范围。
优化过程计算复杂度可能较高，未在摘要中讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用MLS点云和置信度驱动的优化方法，自动修正ALS粗模的立面几何误差，实现厘米级对齐并保证拓扑有效性。

papers.title: Automated Conjecture Resolution with Formal Verification
papers.abstract: Recent advances in large language models have significantly improved their ability to perform mathematical reasoning, extending from elementary problem solving to increasingly capable performance on research-level problems. However, reliably solving and verifying such problems remains challenging due to the inherent ambiguity of natural language reasoning. In this paper, we propose an automated framework for tackling research-level mathematical problems that integrates natural language reasoning with formal verification, enabling end-to-end problem solving with minimal human intervention. Our framework consists of two components: an informal reasoning agent, Rethlas, and a formal verification agent, Archon. Rethlas mimics the workflow of human mathematicians by combining reasoning primitives with our theorem search engine, Matlas, to explore solution strategies and construct candidate proofs. Archon, equipped with our formal theorem search engine LeanSearch, translates informal arguments into formalized Lean 4 projects through structured task decomposition, iterative refinement, and automated proof synthesis, ensuring machine-checkable correctness. Using this framework, we automatically resolve an open problem in commutative algebra and formally verify the resulting proof in Lean 4 with essentially no human involvement. Our experiments demonstrate that strong theorem retrieval tools enable the discovery and application of cross-domain mathematical techniques, while the formal agent is capable of autonomously filling nontrivial gaps in informal arguments. More broadly, our work illustrates a promising paradigm for mathematical research in which informal and formal reasoning systems, equipped with theorem retrieval tools, operate in tandem to produce verifiable results, substantially reduce human effort, and offer a concrete instantiation of human-AI collaborative mathematical research.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个结合非正式推理与形式化验证的自动化框架，自动解决开放数学问题并生成Lean 4可验证证明。
analysis.research_motivation: 大语言模型在数学推理上取得进展，但自然语言推理的固有歧义使得可靠求解和验证研究级问题仍然困难。
analysis.problem: 如何自动化地解决研究级数学问题，并生成机器可验证的形式化证明，减少人工干预。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出双智能体框架：非正式推理智能体Rethlas结合定理搜索引擎Matlas探索策略并构建候选证明；形式化验证智能体Archon通过结构化任务分解、迭代精炼和自动证明合成，将非正式论证转化为Lean 4形式化项目。
contributions: 提出一个自动化框架，集成非正式推理与形式化验证，实现端到端问题求解。
自动解决一个交换代数开放问题，并在Lean 4中形式化验证，几乎无需人工参与。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 框架依赖定理检索工具的质量和覆盖范围。
形式化验证可能无法处理所有非正式推理中的细微漏洞。
analysis.primary_area_en: neurosymbolic & hybrid AI systems (physics-informed, logic & formal reasoning, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个结合非正式推理与形式化验证的自动化框架，自动解决开放数学问题并生成Lean 4可验证证明。

papers.title: Decomposing Communication Gain and Delay Cost Under Cross-Timestep Delays in Cooperative Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Communication is essential for coordination in \emph{cooperative} multi-agent reinforcement learning under partial observability, yet \emph{cross-timestep} delays cause messages to arrive multiple timesteps after generation, inducing temporal misalignment and making information stale when consumed. We formalize this setting as a delayed-communication partially observable Markov game (DeComm-POMG) and decompose a message's effect into \emph{communication gain} and \emph{delay cost}, yielding the Communication Gain and Delay Cost (CGDC) metric. We further establish a value-loss bound showing that the degradation induced by delayed messages is upper-bounded by a discounted accumulation of an information gap between the action distributions induced by timely versus delayed messages. Guided by CGDC, we propose \textbf{CDCMA}, an actor--critic framework that requests messages only when predicted CGDC is positive, predicts future observations to reduce misalignment at consumption, and fuses delayed messages via CGDC-guided attention. Experiments on no-teammate-vision variants of Cooperative Navigation and Predator Prey, and on SMAC maps across multiple delay levels show consistent improvements in performance, robustness, and generalization, with ablations validating each component.

analysis.tldr: 提出CGDC指标分解通信增益与延迟代价，并设计CDCMA框架在跨时间步延迟下提升多智能体协作性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 多智能体强化学习中通信对协调至关重要，但跨时间步延迟导致消息到达时已过时，造成时间错位和信息陈旧，现有方法缺乏对这种延迟影响的系统分析和有效应对。
analysis.problem: 解决部分可观测环境下跨时间步延迟消息带来的性能退化问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 延迟消息导致动作分布的信息差距，其累积折扣和上界了性能损失。
analysis.method: 提出CDCMA框架，包括：基于CGDC指标的正增益请求策略、预测未来观测以减少错位、以及CGDC引导的注意力融合延迟消息。
contributions: 形式化延迟通信部分可观测马尔可夫博弈（DeComm-POMG）并分解通信增益与延迟代价（CGDC）。
建立值损失上界，揭示延迟消息导致的信息差距与性能退化的关系。
提出CDCMA框架，在多个任务上验证了性能、鲁棒性和泛化性的提升。
analysis.experiments: 在无队友视觉的Cooperative Navigation、Predator Prey以及SMAC地图上，跨多个延迟水平进行实验，显示一致改进，消融实验验证了各组件有效性。
limitations: 可能依赖准确的未来观测预测模型。
CGDC计算可能引入额外计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CGDC指标分解通信增益与延迟代价，并设计CDCMA框架在跨时间步延迟下提升多智能体协作性能。

papers.title: An Improved Last-Iterate Convergence Rate for Anchored Gradient Descent Ascent
papers.abstract: We analyze the last-iterate convergence of the Anchored Gradient Descent Ascent algorithm for smooth convex-concave min-max problems. While previous work established a last-iterate rate of $\mathcal{O}(1/t^{2-2p})$ for the squared gradient norm, where $p \in (1/2, 1)$, it remained an open problem whether the improved exact $\mathcal{O}(1/t)$ rate is achievable. In this work, we resolve this question in the affirmative. This result was discovered autonomously by an AI system capable of writing formal proofs in Lean. The Lean proof can be accessed at https://github.com/google-deepmind/formal-conjectures/pull/3675/commits/a13226b49fd3b897f4c409194f3bcbeb96a08515

analysis.tldr: 锚定梯度上升下降算法在凸-凹极小极大问题中达到最优的O(1/t)最后迭代收敛率。
analysis.research_motivation: 锚定梯度上升下降算法在凸-凹极小极大问题中已有O(1/t^{2-2p})的收敛率，但能否达到更优的O(1/t)率是开放问题，解决此问题对理解算法极限和实际应用有重要意义。
analysis.problem: 证明锚定梯度上升下降算法在光滑凸-凹极小极大问题中最后迭代的平方梯度范数收敛率达到O(1/t)。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 通过理论分析，利用锚定技巧和凸-凹结构，改进了收敛率分析，得到精确的O(1/t)上界。
contributions: 证明了锚定梯度上升下降算法在光滑凸-凹极小极大问题中最后迭代的平方梯度范数收敛率达到O(1/t)，解决了开放问题。
该证明由能够用Lean编写形式化证明的AI系统自主发现，展示了AI在数学证明中的潜力。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 结果仅适用于光滑凸-凹极小极大问题，非凸-非凹情形未涉及。
理论分析未考虑随机梯度或噪声的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: optimization
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 锚定梯度上升下降算法在凸-凹极小极大问题中达到最优的O(1/t)最后迭代收敛率。

papers.title: CountsDiff: A Diffusion Model on the Natural Numbers for Generation and Imputation of Count-Based Data
papers.abstract: Diffusion models have excelled at generative tasks for both continuous and token-based domains, but their application to discrete ordinal data remains underdeveloped. We present CountsDiff, a diffusion framework designed to natively model distributions on the natural numbers. CountsDiff extends the Blackout diffusion framework by simplifying its formulation through a direct parameterization in terms of a survival probability schedule and an explicit loss weighting. This introduces flexibility through design parameters with direct analogues in existing diffusion modeling frameworks. Beyond this reparameterization, CountsDiff introduces features from modern diffusion models, previously absent in counts-based domains, including continuous-time training, classifier-free guidance, and churn/remasking reverse dynamics that allow non-monotone reverse trajectories. We propose an initial instantiation of CountsDiff and validate it on natural image datasets (CIFAR-10, CelebA), exploring the effects of varying the introduced design parameters in a complex, well-studied, and interpretable data domain. We then highlight biological count assays as a natural use case, evaluating CountsDiff on single-cell RNA-seq imputation in a fetal cell and heart cell atlas. Remarkably, we find that even this simple instantiation matches or surpasses the performance of a state-of-the-art discrete generative model and leading RNA-seq imputation methods, while leaving substantial headroom for further gains through optimized design choices in future work.

analysis.tldr: CountsDiff将扩散模型扩展到自然数域，用于计数数据的生成和插补，在图像和单细胞RNA-seq数据上取得有竞争力的结果。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散模型在连续和基于token的领域表现出色，但针对离散序数数据（如计数数据）的应用仍不成熟，现有方法缺乏专门针对自然数分布的生成框架。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个原生支持自然数分布的扩散模型，用于计数数据的生成和插补。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: CountsDiff扩展了Blackout扩散框架，通过生存概率调度和显式损失权重简化公式，并引入连续时间训练、无分类器引导和允许非单调反向轨迹的churn/remasking机制。
contributions: 提出CountsDiff，一个原生建模自然数分布的扩散框架，通过重新参数化简化Blackout扩散。
引入现代扩散模型特性（连续时间训练、无分类器引导、churn/remasking）到计数数据领域。
在自然图像和单细胞RNA-seq插补任务上验证，匹配或超越现有方法。
analysis.experiments: 在CIFAR-10和CelebA图像数据集上探索设计参数影响，并在胎儿细胞和心脏细胞图谱的单细胞RNA-seq插补任务上评估，匹配或超越最先进的离散生成模型和RNA-seq插补方法。
limitations: 当前仅验证了简单实例化，最优设计选择尚未探索。
在更复杂的计数数据场景（如高维稀疏计数）上的表现未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CountsDiff将扩散模型扩展到自然数域，用于计数数据的生成和插补，在图像和单细胞RNA-seq数据上取得有竞争力的结果。

papers.title: When Does Multimodal AI Help? Diagnostic Complementarity of Vision-Language Models and CNNs for Spectrum Management in Satellite-Terrestrial Networks
papers.abstract: The adoption of vision-language models (VLMs) for wireless network management is accelerating, yet no systematic understanding exists of where these large foundation models outperform lightweight convolutional neural networks (CNNs) for spectrum-related tasks. This paper presents the first diagnostic comparison of VLMs and CNNs for spectrum heatmap understanding in non-terrestrial network and terrestrial network (NTN-TN) cooperative systems. We introduce SpectrumQA, a benchmark comprising 108K visual question-answer pairs across four granularity levels: scene classification (L1), regional reasoning (L2), spatial localization (L3), and semantic reasoning (L4). Our experiments on three NTN-TN scenarios with a frozen Qwen2-VL-7B and a trained ResNet-18 reveal a clear taskdependent complementarity: CNN achieves 72.9% accuracy at severity classification (L1) and 0.552 IoU at spatial localization (L3), while VLM uniquely enables semantic reasoning (L4) with F1=0.576 using only three in-context examples-a capability fundamentally absent in CNN architectures. Chain-of-thought (CoT) prompting further improves VLM reasoning by 12.6% (F1: 0.209->0.233) while having zero effect on spatial tasks, confirming that the complementarity is rooted in architectural differences rather than prompting limitations. A deterministic task-type router that delegates supervised tasks to CNN and reasoning tasks to VLM achieves a composite score of 0.616, a 39.1% improvement over CNN alone. We further show that VLM representations exhibit stronger cross-scenario robustness, with smaller performance degradation in 5 out of 6 transfer directions. These findings provide actionable guidelines: deploy CNNs for spatial localization and VLMs for semantic spectrum reasoning, rather than treating them as substitutes.

analysis.tldr: 首次系统比较VLM与CNN在频谱热图理解中的互补性，提出SpectrumQA基准和任务路由策略。
analysis.research_motivation: VLM在无线网络管理中应用加速，但缺乏对VLM与轻量CNN在频谱任务中性能差异的系统理解，无法指导实际部署。
analysis.problem: 解决VLM和CNN在卫星-地面网络频谱热图理解任务中的性能比较与互补性利用问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: CNN在场景分类和空间定位上表现更好，VLM在语义推理上具有独特能力；CoT仅提升VLM推理任务，不影响空间任务；VLM跨场景鲁棒性更强。
analysis.method: 构建SpectrumQA基准（108K VQA对，4个粒度），比较冻结Qwen2-VL-7B与训练ResNet-18，提出确定性任务类型路由器将监督任务分配给CNN、推理任务分配给VLM。
contributions: 首次系统诊断VLM与CNN在频谱热图理解中的互补性
构建SpectrumQA基准，覆盖四个推理粒度
提出任务路由策略，复合得分提升39.1%
揭示VLM跨场景鲁棒性优势
analysis.experiments: 在三个NTN-TN场景上实验，CNN在L1准确率72.9%、L3 IoU 0.552；VLM在L4 F1=0.576；CoT提升VLM推理F1 12.6%。
limitations: 仅使用单一VLM（Qwen2-VL-7B）和CNN（ResNet-18），泛化性待验证
任务路由器为确定性规则，未考虑动态或混合任务
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首次系统比较VLM与CNN在频谱热图理解中的互补性，提出SpectrumQA基准和任务路由策略。

papers.title: M2StyleGS: Multi-Modality 3D Style Transfer with Gaussian Splatting
papers.abstract: Conventional 3D style transfer methods rely on a fixed reference image to apply artistic patterns to 3D scenes. However, in practical applications such as virtual or augmented reality, users often prefer more flexible inputs, including textual descriptions and diverse imagery. In this work, we introduce a novel real-time styling technique M2StyleGS to generate a sequence of precisely color-mapped views. It utilizes 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) as a 3D presentation and multi-modality knowledge refined by CLIP as a reference style. M2StyleGS resolves the abnormal transformation issue by employing a precise feature alignment, namely subdivisive flow, it strengthens the projection of the mapped CLIP text-visual combination feature to the VGG style feature. In addition, we introduce observation loss, which assists in the stylized scene better matching the reference style during the generation, and suppression loss, which suppresses the offset of reference color information throughout the decoding process. By integrating these approaches, M2StyleGS can employ text or images as references to generate a set of style-enhanced novel views. Our experiments show that M2StyleGS achieves better visual quality and surpasses the previous work by up to 32.92% in terms of consistency.

analysis.tldr: M2StyleGS利用3D高斯泼溅和CLIP多模态知识实现实时3D风格迁移，支持文本或图像参考，并通过特征对齐和损失函数提升一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统3D风格迁移依赖固定参考图像，无法满足用户对文本描述等灵活输入的需求，且现有方法在色彩映射和一致性上存在不足。
analysis.problem: 如何利用多模态输入（文本或图像）实现实时、高一致性的3D场景风格迁移。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于3D高斯泼溅（3DGS）作为3D表示，使用CLIP精炼的多模态知识作为参考风格；通过细分流（subdivisive flow）进行精确特征对齐，增强CLIP文本-视觉组合特征到VGG风格特征的投影；引入观察损失和抑制损失分别辅助风格匹配和抑制颜色偏移。
contributions: 提出M2StyleGS，首个支持文本或图像参考的实时3D风格迁移方法。
设计细分流特征对齐和两种损失函数（观察损失、抑制损失），提升风格迁移的一致性和视觉质量。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明M2StyleGS在视觉质量上优于先前工作，一致性提升高达32.92%。
limitations: 可能依赖CLIP和VGG特征的预训练质量。
未提及对复杂场景或动态场景的适应性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: M2StyleGS利用3D高斯泼溅和CLIP多模态知识实现实时3D风格迁移，支持文本或图像参考，并通过特征对齐和损失函数提升一致性。

papers.title: RL-Driven Sustainable Land-Use Allocation for the Lake Malawi Basin
papers.abstract: Unsustainable land-use practices in ecologically sensitive regions threaten biodiversity, water resources, and the livelihoods of millions. This paper presents a deep reinforcement learning (RL) framework for optimizing land-use allocation in the Lake Malawi Basin to maximize total ecosystem service value (ESV). Drawing on the benefit transfer methodology of Costanza et al., we assign biome-specific ESV coefficients -- locally anchored to a Malawi wetland valuation -- to nine land-cover classes derived from Sentinel-2 imagery. The RL environment models a 50x50 cell grid at 500m resolution, where a Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) agent with action masking iteratively transfers land-use pixels between modifiable classes. The reward function combines per-cell ecological value with spatial coherence objectives: contiguity bonuses for ecologically connected land-use patches (forest, cropland, built area etc.) and buffer zone penalties for high-impact development adjacent to water bodies. We evaluate the framework across three scenarios: (i) pure ESV maximization, (ii) ESV with spatial reward shaping, and (iii) a regenerative agriculture policy scenario. Results demonstrate that the agent effectively learns to increase total ESV; that spatial reward shaping successfully steers allocations toward ecologically sound patterns, including homogeneous land-use clustering and slight forest consolidation near water bodies; and that the framework responds meaningfully to policy parameter changes, establishing its utility as a scenario-analysis tool for environmental planning.

analysis.tldr: 用深度强化学习优化马拉维湖流域的土地利用分配，最大化生态系统服务价值。
analysis.research_motivation: 生态敏感区不可持续的土地利用威胁生物多样性、水资源和生计，需要智能规划工具。
analysis.problem: 如何通过强化学习自动分配土地利用类型以最大化总生态系统服务价值并兼顾空间连贯性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于PPO的深度强化学习框架，在50x50网格环境中通过动作掩码迭代转移土地利用像素，奖励函数结合生态价值和空间连贯性目标（连通性奖励和水体缓冲区惩罚）。
contributions: 提出首个用于土地利用分配的深度强化学习框架，在马拉维湖流域验证有效性。
设计包含空间连贯性奖励的奖励函数，引导生态合理的土地利用模式。
展示框架作为环境规划情景分析工具的实用性。
analysis.experiments: 在三种情景（纯ESV最大化、ESV+空间奖励、再生农业政策）下评估，结果表明代理能有效提升总ESV，空间奖励塑造成功引导生态合理分配。
limitations: 仅基于单一流域和特定ESV系数，泛化性待验证。
网格分辨率500m，可能忽略局部细节。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 用深度强化学习优化马拉维湖流域的土地利用分配，最大化生态系统服务价值。

papers.title: ITIScore: An Image-to-Text-to-Image Rating Framework for the Image Captioning Ability of MLLMs
papers.abstract: Recent advances in multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have greatly improved image understanding and captioning capabilities. However, existing image captioning benchmarks typically suffer from limited diversity in caption length, the absence of recent advanced MLLMs, and insufficient human annotations, which potentially introduces bias and limits the ability to comprehensively assess the performance of modern MLLMs. To address these limitations, we present a new large-scale image captioning benchmark, termed, ICBench, which covers 12 content categories and consists of both short and long captions generated by 10 advanced MLLMs on 2K images, resulting in 40K captions in total. We conduct extensive human subjective studies to obtain mean opinion scores (MOSs) across fine-grained evaluation dimensions, where short captions are assessed in terms of fluency, relevance, and conciseness, while long captions are evaluated based on fluency, relevance, and completeness. Furthermore, we propose an automated evaluation metric, \textbf{ITIScore}, based on an image-to-text-to-image framework, which measures caption quality through reconstruction consistency. Experimental results demonstrate strong alignment between our automatic metric and human judgments, as well as robust zero-shot generalization ability on other public captioning datasets. Both the dataset and model will be released upon publication.

analysis.tldr: 提出ICBench基准和ITIScore自动评估指标，用于评估多模态大模型的图像描述能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有图像描述基准存在描述长度多样性不足、缺乏最新MLLM评估、人工标注有限等问题，导致评估偏差，无法全面衡量现代MLLM的性能。
analysis.problem: 如何构建大规模、多样化的图像描述基准，并提出与人类判断高度一致的自动评估指标。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建ICBench基准（2K图像、10个MLLM生成40K描述，覆盖12个内容类别，含短描述和长描述），并提出ITIScore自动评估指标，基于图像-文本-图像框架通过重建一致性衡量描述质量。
contributions: 提出ICBench，一个大规模、多样化的图像描述基准，包含40K描述和细粒度人工评分。
提出ITIScore自动评估指标，基于图像-文本-图像重建一致性，与人类判断高度对齐。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明ITIScore与人类判断强对齐，并在其他公开描述数据集上具有鲁棒的零样本泛化能力。
limitations: ITIScore依赖图像重建，可能对某些抽象描述不敏感。
基准仅覆盖12个内容类别，可能未涵盖所有场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ICBench基准和ITIScore自动评估指标，用于评估多模态大模型的图像描述能力。

papers.title: Automated Attention Pattern Discovery at Scale in Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Large language models have found success by scaling up capabilities to work in general settings. The same can unfortunately not be said for interpretability methods. The current trend in mechanistic interpretability is to provide precise explanations of specific behaviors in controlled settings. These often do not generalize, or are too resource intensive for larger studies. In this work we propose to study repeated behaviors in large language models by mining completion scenarios in Java code datasets, through exploiting the structured nature of code. We collect the attention patterns generated in the attention heads to demonstrate that they are scalable signals for global interpretability of model components. We show that vision models offer a promising direction for analyzing attention patterns at scale. To demonstrate this, we introduce the Attention Pattern - Masked Autoencoder(AP-MAE), a vision transformer-based model that efficiently reconstructs masked attention patterns. Experiments on StarCoder2 show that AP-MAE (i) reconstructs masked attention patterns with high accuracy, (ii) generalizes across unseen models with minimal degradation, (iii) reveals recurring patterns across inferences, (iv) predicts whether a generation will be correct without access to ground truth, with accuracies ranging from 55% to 70% depending on the task, and (v) enables targeted interventions that increase accuracy by 13.6% when applied selectively, but cause collapse when applied excessively. These results establish attention patterns as a scalable signal for interpretability and demonstrate that AP-MAE provides a transferable foundation for both analysis and intervention in large language models. Beyond its standalone value, AP-MAE also serves as a selection procedure to guide fine-grained mechanistic approaches. We release code and models to support future work in large-scale interpretability.

analysis.tldr: 提出AP-MAE模型，利用视觉Transformer高效重建大规模语言模型的注意力模式，实现可扩展的可解释性分析与干预。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前机械可解释性方法通常针对特定行为在受控环境中提供精确解释，难以泛化且资源消耗大，无法应用于大规模研究。
