analysis.problem: 如何在大规模语言模型中高效发现和利用重复出现的注意力模式，以实现全局可解释性分析和干预。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 注意力模式在不同推理中呈现重复模式，且与生成正确性相关；过度干预会导致模型崩溃。
analysis.method: 提出AP-MAE，一种基于视觉Transformer的掩码自编码器，通过挖掘Java代码数据集中的结构化完成场景收集注意力模式，并训练模型高效重建被掩码的注意力模式。
contributions: 提出AP-MAE模型，实现大规模注意力模式的高效重建与分析
证明注意力模式可作为可扩展的可解释性信号，并展示其在正确性预测和针对性干预中的应用
analysis.experiments: 在StarCoder2上进行实验，AP-MAE能高精度重建掩码注意力模式，跨未见模型泛化良好，正确性预测准确率55%-70%，选择性干预提升准确率13.6%。
limitations: 实验仅基于Java代码数据集，可能不直接泛化到自然语言领域
过度干预导致模型崩溃，干预策略的鲁棒性有待进一步研究
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出AP-MAE模型，利用视觉Transformer高效重建大规模语言模型的注意力模式，实现可扩展的可解释性分析与干预。

papers.title: Build on Priors: Vision--Language--Guided Neuro-Symbolic Imitation Learning for Data-Efficient Real-World Robot Manipulation
papers.abstract: Enabling robots to learn long-horizon manipulation tasks from a handful of demonstrations remains a central challenge in robotics. Existing neuro-symbolic approaches often rely on hand-crafted symbolic abstractions, semantically labeled trajectories or large demonstration datasets, limiting their scalability and real-world applicability. We present a scalable neuro-symbolic framework that autonomously constructs symbolic planning domains and data-efficient control policies from as few as one to thirty unannotated skill demonstrations, without requiring manual domain engineering. Our method segments demonstrations into skills and employs a Vision-Language Model (VLM) to classify skills and identify equivalent high-level states, enabling automatic construction of a state-transition graph. This graph is processed by an Answer Set Programming solver to synthesize a PDDL planning domain, which an oracle function exploits to isolate the minimal, task-relevant and target relative observation and action spaces for each skill policy. Policies are learned at the control reference level rather than at the raw actuator signal level, yielding a smoother and less noisy learning target. Known controllers can be leveraged for real-world data augmentation by projecting a single demonstration onto other objects in the scene, simultaneously enriching the graph construction process and the dataset for imitation learning. We validate our framework primarily on a real industrial forklift across statistically rigorous manipulation trials, and demonstrate cross-platform generality on a Kinova Gen3 robotic arm across two standard benchmarks. Our results show that grounding control learning, VLM-driven abstraction, and automated planning synthesis into a unified pipeline constitutes a practical path toward scalable, data-efficient, expert-free and interpretable neuro-symbolic robotics.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种视觉-语言引导的神经符号模仿学习框架，仅需1-30个无标注演示即可实现数据高效的机器人长程操作。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有神经符号方法依赖手工符号抽象、语义标注轨迹或大量演示数据，限制了可扩展性和实际应用。
analysis.problem: 如何从极少量无标注演示中自动构建符号规划域和数据高效的控制策略，实现机器人长程操作。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 通过VLM分割演示并分类技能、识别等价状态，自动构建状态转移图；利用ASP求解器合成PDDL规划域；隔离最小任务相关观测和动作空间；在控制参考层学习策略，并利用已知控制器进行数据增强。
contributions: 提出一个可扩展的神经符号框架，从1-30个无标注演示中自动构建符号规划域和策略。
利用VLM驱动抽象和ASP规划合成，实现数据高效、无需专家、可解释的机器人操作。
analysis.experiments: 主要在真实工业叉车上进行统计严格的操控实验，并在Kinova Gen3机械臂上跨平台验证两个标准基准。
limitations: 可能依赖VLM的分类准确性。
跨平台泛化性可能受限于特定任务。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种视觉-语言引导的神经符号模仿学习框架，仅需1-30个无标注演示即可实现数据高效的机器人长程操作。

papers.title: AutoReSpec: A Framework for Generating Specification using Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Formal specification generation has recently drawn attention in software engineering as a way to improve program correctness without requiring manual annotations. Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown promise in this area, but early results reveal several limitations. Generated specifications often fail verification due to syntax errors, logical inaccuracies, or incomplete reasoning, especially in programs with loops or branching logic. Techniques like SpecGen and FormalBench attempt to address this through prompting and benchmarking, but they typically rely on static prompts and do not offer mechanisms for recovering from failure or adapting to different program structures. In this paper, we present AutoReSpec, a collaborative framework that combines open and closed-source LLMs for verifiable specification generation. AutoReSpec dynamically chooses an LLM pair and prompt configuration based on the structure of the input program. If the primary LLM fails to produce a valid output, a collaborative model is invoked, using validator feedback to refine and correct the specification. This two-stage design enables both speed and robustness. We evaluate AutoReSpec on a new benchmark of 72 real-world and synthetic Java programs. Our results show that it achieves 67 passes out of 72, outperforming SpecGen and FormalBench in both Success Probability and Completeness. Our experimental evaluation achieves a 58.2% success probability and a 69.2% completeness score, while cutting evaluation time by 26.89% on average compared to prior methods. Together, these results demonstrate that AutoReSpec offers a scalable, efficient, and reliable approach to LLM-based formal specification generation.

analysis.tldr: AutoReSpec 通过动态选择 LLM 对和提示配置，结合验证器反馈，显著提升了形式化规约生成的正确性和效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 形式化规约生成能提升程序正确性但需手动标注，LLM 虽有潜力但生成的规约常因语法错误、逻辑不准确或推理不完整而失败，现有方法依赖静态提示且缺乏失败恢复机制。
analysis.problem: 如何利用 LLM 生成可验证的形式化规约，并解决生成过程中的语法错误、逻辑不准确和推理不完整问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM 生成的规约在包含循环或分支逻辑的程序中容易失败，现有方法如 SpecGen 和 FormalBench 使用静态提示，无法从失败中恢复或适应不同程序结构。
analysis.method: AutoReSpec 是一个协作框架，根据输入程序结构动态选择 LLM 对和提示配置；若主 LLM 失败，则调用协作模型，利用验证器反馈细化并修正规约。
contributions: 提出 AutoReSpec 框架，结合开源和闭源 LLM 实现可验证的规约生成。
在 72 个真实世界和合成 Java 程序基准上，AutoReSpec 在成功概率和完整性上优于 SpecGen 和 FormalBench，并减少 26.89% 的平均评估时间。
analysis.experiments: 在 72 个 Java 程序基准上评估，AutoReSpec 达到 67/72 通过，成功概率 58.2%，完整性 69.2%，平均评估时间减少 26.89%。
limitations: 仅针对 Java 程序，可能不适用于其他语言。
依赖 LLM 的可用性和性能，协作模型可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AutoReSpec 通过动态选择 LLM 对和提示配置，结合验证器反馈，显著提升了形式化规约生成的正确性和效率。

papers.title: Can Humans Tell? A Dual-Axis Study of Human Perception of LLM-Generated News
papers.abstract: Can humans tell whether a news article was written by a person or a large language model (LLM)? We investigate this question using JudgeGPT, a study platform that independently measures source attribution (human vs. machine) and authenticity judgment (legitimate vs. fake) on continuous scales. From 2,318 judgments collected from 1,054 participants across content generated by six LLMs, we report five findings: (1) participants cannot reliably distinguish machine-generated from human-written text (p > .05, Welch's t-test); (2) this inability holds across all tested models, including open-weight models with as few as 7B parameters; (3) self-reported domain expertise predicts judgment accuracy (r = .35, p < .001) whereas political orientation does not (r = -.10, n.s.); (4) clustering reveals distinct response strategies ("Skeptics" vs. "Believers"); and (5) accuracy degrades after approximately 30 sequential evaluations due to cognitive fatigue. The answer, in short, is no: humans cannot reliably tell. These results indicate that user-side detection is not a viable defense and motivate system-level countermeasures such as cryptographic content provenance.

analysis.tldr: 人类无法可靠区分LLM生成与人类撰写的新闻文章，且检测能力随认知疲劳下降。
analysis.research_motivation: 随着LLM生成内容的普及，区分机器与人类文本成为关键问题，但人类检测能力尚不明确。
analysis.problem: 评估人类能否可靠区分LLM生成与人类撰写的新闻文章。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 人类无法可靠区分（p>.05），且该能力在所有测试模型（包括7B参数模型）中均不成立；自报领域专业知识与准确率相关（r=.35），政治倾向无关；存在“怀疑者”与“相信者”两种策略；连续评估约30次后准确率下降。
analysis.method: 通过JudgeGPT平台收集2318个判断，独立测量来源归因（人类vs机器）和真实性判断（合法vs虚假）的连续评分。
contributions: 发现人类无法可靠区分LLM生成与人类撰写的新闻文章。
揭示认知疲劳导致检测准确率下降，并识别出不同响应策略。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅针对新闻文章，可能不适用于其他文本类型。
未深入分析不同LLM生成策略对检测的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 人类无法可靠区分LLM生成与人类撰写的新闻文章，且检测能力随认知疲劳下降。

papers.title: Testing the Limits of Truth Directions in LLMs
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have been shown to encode truth of statements in their activation space along a linear truth direction. Previous studies have argued that these directions are universal in certain aspects, while more recent work has questioned this conclusion drawing on limited generalization across some settings. In this work, we identify a number of limits of truth-direction universality that have not been previously understood. We first show that truth directions are highly layer-dependent, and that a full understanding of universality requires probing at many layers in the model. We then show that truth directions depend heavily on task type, emerging in earlier layers for factual and later layers for reasoning tasks; they also vary in performance across levels of task complexity. Finally, we show that model instructions dramatically affect truth directions; simple correctness evaluation instructions significantly affect the generalization ability of truth probes. Our findings indicate that universality claims for truth directions are more limited than previously known, with significant differences observable for various model layers, task difficulties, task types, and prompt templates.

analysis.tldr: LLM中的真理方向在层、任务类型、复杂度和指令下均不通用，其普遍性比先前认知更有限。
analysis.research_motivation: 先前研究声称LLM激活空间中存在线性真理方向且具有普遍性，但近期工作对此提出质疑，需要系统揭示其局限性。
analysis.problem: 系统评估LLM中真理方向在不同层、任务类型、复杂度和指令下的泛化能力，检验其普遍性声称。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 真理方向高度依赖层；事实任务在早期层出现，推理任务在后期层；任务复杂度影响性能；模型指令显著改变方向。
analysis.method: 通过在不同层、任务类型、复杂度和指令下训练线性探针，评估真理方向的泛化性能。
contributions: 发现真理方向高度依赖层，需多层探测才能理解普遍性
揭示真理方向依赖任务类型和复杂度，且受指令显著影响
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅针对特定模型和数据集
未提供缓解局限性的方法
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM中的真理方向在层、任务类型、复杂度和指令下均不通用，其普遍性比先前认知更有限。

papers.title: CREBench: Evaluating Large Language Models in Cryptographic Binary Reverse Engineering
papers.abstract: Reverse engineering (RE) is central to software security, particularly for cryptographic programs that handle sensitive data and are highly prone to vulnerabilities. It supports critical tasks such as vulnerability discovery and malware analysis. Despite its importance, RE remains labor-intensive and requires substantial expertise, making large language models (LLMs) a potential solution for automating the process. However, their capabilities for RE remain systematically underexplored. To address this gap, we study the cryptographic binary RE capabilities of LLMs and introduce \textbf{CREBench}, a benchmark comprising 432 challenges built from 48 standard cryptographic algorithms, 3 insecure crypto key usage scenarios, and 3 difficulty levels. Each challenge follows a Capture-the-Flag (CTF) RE challenge, requiring the model to analyze the underlying cryptographic logic and recover the correct input. We design an evaluation framework comprising four sub-tasks, from algorithm identification to correct flag recovery. We evaluate eight frontier LLMs on CREBench. GPT-5.4, the best-performing model, achieves 64.03 out of 100 and recovers the flag in 59\% of challenges. We also establish a strong human expert baseline of 92.19 points, showing that humans maintain an advantage in cryptographic RE tasks. Our code and dataset are available at https://github.com/wangyu-ovo/CREBench.

analysis.tldr: 提出CREBench基准测试，评估大语言模型在密码学二进制逆向工程中的能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 逆向工程对软件安全至关重要，尤其是密码学程序，但该任务劳动密集且需要专业知识，LLMs有望自动化该过程，但其能力尚未被系统探索。
analysis.problem: 系统评估LLMs在密码学二进制逆向工程中的能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 最佳模型GPT-5.4得分64.03/100，恢复flag成功率59%，而人类专家基线92.19分，表明人类仍具优势。
analysis.method: 构建包含432个挑战的基准CREBench，涵盖48种标准密码算法、3种不安全密钥使用场景和3个难度级别，设计四个子任务评估框架。
contributions: 提出CREBench基准，系统评估LLMs在密码学二进制逆向工程中的能力。
评估8个前沿LLM，建立人类专家基线，揭示当前LLM与人类差距。
analysis.experiments: 在CREBench上评估8个前沿LLM，GPT-5.4最佳得分64.03/100，flag恢复率59%；人类专家基线92.19分。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖48种密码算法，可能不全面。
未探讨LLM在更复杂逆向任务上的表现。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CREBench基准测试，评估大语言模型在密码学二进制逆向工程中的能力。

papers.title: Real-time Neural Six-way Lightmaps
papers.abstract: Participating media are a pervasive and intriguing visual effect in virtual environments. Unfortunately, rendering such phenomena in real-time is notoriously difficult due to the computational expense of estimating the volume rendering equation. While the six-way lightmaps technique has been widely used in video games to render smoke with a camera-oriented billboard and approximate lighting effects using six precomputed lightmaps, achieving a balance between realism and efficiency, it is limited to pre-simulated animation sequences and is ignorant of camera movement. In this work, we propose a neural six-way lightmaps method to strike a long-sought balance between dynamics and visual realism. Our approach first generates a guiding map from the camera view using ray marching with a large sampling distance to approximate smoke scattering and silhouette. Then, given a guiding map, we train a neural network to predict the corresponding six-way lightmaps. The resulting lightmaps can be seamlessly used in existing game engine pipelines. This approach supports visually appealing rendering effects while enabling real-time user interactivity, including smoke-obstacle interaction, camera movement, and light change. By conducting a series of comprehensive benchmarks, we demonstrate that our method is well-suited for real-time applications, such as games and VR/AR.

analysis.tldr: 提出神经六向光照图方法，实现实时动态烟雾渲染。
analysis.research_motivation: 参与介质（如烟雾）的实时渲染计算成本高，现有六向光照图技术局限于预模拟动画序列且无法响应相机运动，难以兼顾动态性与视觉真实感。
analysis.problem: 如何在实时交互环境中高效生成动态烟雾的六向光照图，支持相机移动、烟雾-障碍物交互和光照变化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 首先通过大步长光线步进从相机视角生成引导图，近似烟雾散射和轮廓；然后训练神经网络根据引导图预测对应的六向光照图，结果可直接用于现有游戏引擎管线。
contributions: 提出神经六向光照图方法，在动态性与视觉真实感之间取得平衡。
支持实时用户交互，包括相机移动、烟雾-障碍物交互和光照变化。
analysis.experiments: 通过一系列综合基准测试，证明该方法适用于游戏和VR/AR等实时应用。
limitations: 可能依赖特定场景的训练数据，泛化性未知。
引导图生成的质量可能影响最终渲染效果。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出神经六向光照图方法，实现实时动态烟雾渲染。

papers.title: Structured Multi-Criteria Evaluation of Large Language Models with Fuzzy Analytic Hierarchy Process and DualJudge
papers.abstract: Effective evaluation of large language models (LLMs) remains a critical bottleneck, as conventional direct scoring often yields inconsistent and opaque judgments. In this work, we adapt the Analytic Hierarchy Process (AHP) to LLM-based evaluation and, more importantly, propose a confidence-aware Fuzzy AHP (FAHP) extension that models epistemic uncertainty via triangular fuzzy numbers modulated by LLM-generated confidence scores. Systematically validated on JudgeBench, our structured approach decomposes assessments into explicit criteria and incorporates uncertainty-aware aggregation, producing more calibrated judgments. Extensive experiments demonstrate that both crisp and fuzzy AHP consistently outperform direct scoring across model scales and dataset splits, with FAHP showing superior stability in uncertain comparison scenarios. Building on these insights, we propose \textbf{DualJudge}, a hybrid framework inspired by Dual-Process Theory that adaptively fuses holistic direct scores with structured AHP outputs via consistency-aware weighting. DualJudge achieves state-of-the-art performance, underscoring the complementary strengths of intuitive and deliberative evaluation paradigms. These results establish uncertainty-aware structured reasoning as a principled pathway toward more reliable LLM assessment. Code is available at https://github.com/hreyulog/AHP_llm_judge.

analysis.tldr: 将模糊层次分析法（FAHP）与置信度感知结合，提出DualJudge框架，实现更可靠的大语言模型评估。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统直接评分法评估LLM时结果不一致且不透明，亟需更系统、可解释的评估方法。
analysis.problem: 如何利用结构化多准则决策（AHP）及其模糊扩展（FAHP）提升LLM评估的校准性和稳定性，并融合直觉与审慎评估范式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 直接评分法在不确定比较场景下表现不稳定，而AHP和FAHP能产生更校准的判断，FAHP在不确定场景下稳定性更优。
analysis.method: 将AHP适配到LLM评估，提出置信度感知的模糊AHP（FAHP），用三角模糊数建模认知不确定性；进一步提出DualJudge框架，自适应融合直接评分与结构化AHP输出。
contributions: 将AHP和FAHP引入LLM评估，实现结构化、不确定性感知的评估。
提出DualJudge混合框架，融合直觉与审慎评估，达到SOTA性能。
analysis.experiments: 在JudgeBench上系统验证，AHP和FAHP在所有模型规模和数据集划分上均优于直接评分，FAHP在不确定场景下稳定性更好，DualJudge达到SOTA。
limitations: 可能依赖LLM生成的置信度分数质量。
AHP准则设计可能需人工干预。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将模糊层次分析法（FAHP）与置信度感知结合，提出DualJudge框架，实现更可靠的大语言模型评估。

papers.title: Shower-Aware Dual-Stream Voxel Networks for Structural Defect Detection in Cosmic-Ray Muon Tomography
papers.abstract: We present SA-DSVN, a 3D convolutional architecture for voxel-level segmentation of structural defects in reinforced concrete using cosmic-ray muon tomography. Unlike conventional reconstruction methods (POCA, MLSD) that rely solely on muon scattering angles, our approach jointly processes scattering kinematics (9 channels) and secondary electromagnetic shower multiplicities (40 channels) through independent encoder streams fused via cross-attention. Training data were generated using Vega, a cloud-native Geant4 simulation framework, producing 4.5 million muon events across 900 volumes containing four defect types - honeycombing, shear fracture, corrosion voids, and delamination - embedded within a dense 7x7 rebar cage. A five-variant ablation study demonstrates that the shower multiplicity stream alone accounts for the majority of discriminative power, raising defect-mean Dice from 0.535 (scattering only) to 0.685 (shower only). On 60 independently simulated validation volumes, the model achieves 96.3% voxel accuracy, per-defect Dice scores of 0.59-0.81, and 100% volume-level detection sensitivity at 10 ms inference per volume. These results establish secondary shower multiplicity as a previously unexploited but highly effective feature for learned muon tomographic reconstruction.

analysis.tldr: 提出SA-DSVN双流3D卷积网络，利用宇宙射线μ子散射和次级电磁簇射特征检测混凝土结构缺陷，簇射特征贡献最大。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统μ子断层成像重建方法（如POCA、MLSD）仅依赖散射角度，对结构缺陷的检测能力有限，且未利用次级电磁簇射信息。
analysis.problem: 如何利用μ子散射运动学和次级电磁簇射多重性联合特征，实现钢筋混凝土结构缺陷的体素级分割。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要通过消融实验发现，次级簇射多重性流单独贡献了大部分判别能力，将缺陷平均Dice从0.535（仅散射）提升至0.685（仅簇射），表明簇射特征是此前未被利用但高效的特征。
analysis.method: 提出SA-DSVN，包含两个独立编码器流分别处理散射运动学（9通道）和次级电磁簇射多重性（40通道），通过交叉注意力融合，进行3D体素级缺陷分割。
contributions: 首次将次级电磁簇射多重性作为特征用于学习型μ子断层成像重建，并证明其有效性。
提出双流3D卷积架构SA-DSVN，通过交叉注意力融合散射和簇射特征，实现高精度缺陷检测。
analysis.experiments: 使用Vega框架（基于Geant4）生成450万μ子事件，包含900个体积和四种缺陷类型（蜂窝、剪切断裂、腐蚀空洞、分层），在60个独立验证体积上达到96.3%体素准确率、缺陷Dice 0.59-0.81、100%体积级检测灵敏度，推理时间10ms/体积。
limitations: 训练数据为仿真生成，真实场景性能待验证。
仅针对钢筋混凝土结构，泛化性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SA-DSVN双流3D卷积网络，利用宇宙射线μ子散射和次级电磁簇射特征检测混凝土结构缺陷，簇射特征贡献最大。

papers.title: Rethinking Position Embedding as a Context Controller for Multi-Reference and Multi-Shot Video Generation
papers.abstract: Recent proprietary models such as Sora2 demonstrate promising progress in generating multi-shot videos conditioned on multiple reference characters. However, academic research on this problem remains limited. We study this task and identify a core challenge: when reference images exhibit highly similar appearances, the model often suffers from reference confusion, where semantically similar tokens degrade the model's ability to retrieve the correct context. To address this, we introduce PoCo (Position Embedding as a Context Controller), which incorporates position encoding as additional context control beyond semantic retrieval. By employing side information of tokens, PoCo enables precise token-level matching while preserving implicit semantic consistency modeling. Building on PoCo, we develop a multi-reference and multi-shot video generation model capable of reliably controlling characters with extremely similar visual traits. Extensive experiments demonstrate that PoCo improves cross-shot consistency and reference fidelity compared with various baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出位置编码作为上下文控制器（PoCo），解决多参考多镜头视频生成中的参考混淆问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有学术研究对多参考多镜头视频生成关注有限，且当参考图像外观高度相似时，模型易出现参考混淆，即语义相似token干扰正确上下文检索。
analysis.problem: 多参考多镜头视频生成中，参考图像高度相似导致的参考混淆问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 当参考图像外观高度相似时，模型难以区分不同参考，导致语义相似token降低上下文检索准确性。
analysis.method: 提出PoCo，将位置编码作为额外上下文控制信号，利用token的侧边信息实现精确的token级匹配，同时保留隐式语义一致性建模。
contributions: 识别并分析了多参考多镜头视频生成中的参考混淆问题。
提出PoCo方法，通过位置编码增强上下文控制，提升跨镜头一致性和参考保真度。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定位置编码设计，泛化性需验证。
未提及对大规模复杂场景的扩展性。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出位置编码作为上下文控制器（PoCo），解决多参考多镜头视频生成中的参考混淆问题。

papers.title: RCP: Representation Consistency Pruner for Mitigating Distribution Shift in Large Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) suffer from prohibitive inference costs due to the massive number of visual tokens processed by the language decoder. Existing pruning methods often lead to significant performance degradation because the irreversible removal of visual tokens causes a distribution shift in the hidden states that deviates from the pre-trained full-token regime. To address this, we propose Representation Consistency Pruner, which we refer to as RCP, as a novel framework that integrates cumulative visual token pruning with a delayed repair mechanism. Specifically, we introduce a cross-attention pruner that leverages the intrinsic attention of the LLM as a baseline to predict cumulative masks, ensuring consistent and monotonic token reduction across layers. To compensate for the resulting information loss, we design a delayed repair adapter denoted as DRA, which caches the essence of pruned tokens and applies FiLM-based modulation specifically to the answer generation tokens. We employ a repair loss to match the first and second-order statistics of the pruned representations with a full-token teacher. RCP is highly efficient because it trains only lightweight plug-in modules while allowing for physical token discarding at inference. Extensive experiments on LVLM benchmarks demonstrate that RCP removes up to 88.9\% of visual tokens and reduces FLOPs by up to 85.7\% with only a marginal average accuracy drop, and outperforms prior methods that avoid fine-tuning the original model on several widely used benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: 提出表示一致性剪枝器RCP，通过累积视觉token剪枝和延迟修复机制缓解分布偏移，在LVLM上实现高达88.9%的token压缩且性能损失极小。
analysis.research_motivation: 大型视觉语言模型（LVLM）因语言解码器处理大量视觉token导致推理成本高昂，现有剪枝方法因不可逆移除token造成隐藏状态分布偏移，导致性能显著下降。
analysis.problem: 如何在剪枝视觉token时缓解分布偏移，保持与全token训练一致的表示，从而在降低推理成本的同时维持模型性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，现有剪枝方法因不可逆移除视觉token导致隐藏状态分布偏离预训练的全token状态，造成性能下降。
analysis.method: 提出RCP框架，包含交叉注意力剪枝器（利用LLM内在注意力预测累积掩码，实现跨层一致单调的token缩减）和延迟修复适配器DRA（缓存剪枝token精华，对答案生成token施加FiLM调制），并采用修复损失匹配剪枝表示与全token教师的一阶和二阶统计量。
contributions: 提出RCP框架，结合累积视觉token剪枝与延迟修复机制，有效缓解分布偏移。
设计DRA适配器，通过缓存和调制补偿信息损失，保持表示一致性。
在多个LVLM基准上，RCP移除高达88.9%的视觉token并减少85.7%的FLOPs，仅带来边际精度下降，优于现有方法。
analysis.experiments: 在LVLM基准上进行广泛实验，RCP移除高达88.9%的视觉token，减少85.7%的FLOPs，平均精度下降极小，并在多个广泛使用的基准上优于先前避免微调原始模型的方法。
limitations: 可能依赖特定模型架构（如交叉注意力机制），通用性需进一步验证。
延迟修复适配器引入额外训练参数，虽轻量但可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出表示一致性剪枝器RCP，通过累积视觉token剪枝和延迟修复机制缓解分布偏移，在LVLM上实现高达88.9%的token压缩且性能损失极小。

papers.title: Safety, Security, and Cognitive Risks in State-Space Models: A Systematic Threat Analysis with Spectral, Stateful, and Capacity Attacks
papers.abstract: State-Space Models (SSMs) -- structured SSMs (S4, S4D, DSS, S5), selective SSMs (Mamba, Mamba-2), and hybrid architectures (Jamba) -- are deployed in safety-critical long-context applications: genomic analysis, clinical time-series forecasting, and cybersecurity log processing. Their linear-time scaling is compelling, yet the security properties of their compressed-state recurrent architectures remain unstudied. We present the first systematic treatment of SSM safety, security, and cognitive risks. Seven contributions: (1) Formal threat framework -- SSM Attack Surface (five layers), State Integrity Violation (StIV), Cross-Context Amplification Ratio $\mathcal{X}_\mathcal{S}$, and a Spectral Sensitivity Proposition grounded in the $H_\infty$ norm. (2) Three novel attack classes: spectral adversarial attacks (transfer-function gain exploitation), delayed-trigger stateful backdoors (activate thousands of steps after injection), and state capacity saturation (entropy flooding forces silent forgetting). (3) 14 MITRE ATLAS technique extensions across the full tactic chain. (4) Six-profile attacker taxonomy with kill chains for genomics, clinical, and cybersecurity domains. (5) Four cognitive risk hypotheses grounded in state-compression mechanics. (6) Governance-aligned mitigations mapped to CREST, NIST AI 600-1, and EU AI Act. (7) Empirical evaluation: targeted genomic injection achieves $\mathrm{StIV}=0.519$ vs. $0.086$ random ($6.0\times$, $p<0.001$); PGD state injection achieves $156\times$ output perturbation over random; SSD-structured extraction confirmed at $O(N^2)$ vs. $O(N^3)$ query complexity ($N\times$ speedup). Validation on pretrained checkpoints is detailed in the Appendix.

analysis.tldr: 首次系统分析状态空间模型（SSM）的安全、安保与认知风险，提出三类新型攻击并验证其有效性。
analysis.research_motivation: SSM 在安全关键的长上下文应用中部署，但其压缩状态循环架构的安全属性尚未被研究，存在潜在风险。
analysis.problem: 系统性地识别、分类和评估 SSM 面临的安全、安保与认知风险，并开发相应的攻击方法和缓解措施。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体的现象分析，但提出了认知风险假设和攻击框架。
analysis.method: 提出形式化威胁框架（SSM 攻击面、状态完整性违反、跨上下文放大比、谱灵敏度命题），设计三类攻击（谱对抗攻击、延迟触发状态后门、状态容量饱和），并构建攻击者分类法和缓解措施。
contributions: 首次系统处理 SSM 安全、安保与认知风险，提出形式化威胁框架。
提出三类新型攻击：谱对抗攻击、延迟触发状态后门、状态容量饱和。
扩展 14 项 MITRE ATLAS 技术，覆盖完整战术链。
提出六类攻击者分类法及基因组、临床、网络安全领域的杀伤链。
提出四项基于状态压缩机制的认知风险假设。
提出与 CREST、NIST AI 600-1、EU AI Act 对齐的缓解措施。
实验验证：靶向基因组注入 StIV=0.519 vs 随机 0.086（6.0倍，p<0.001）；PGD 状态注入输出扰动比随机高156倍；SSD 结构化提取查询复杂度 O(N^2) vs O(N^3)（N倍加速）。
analysis.experiments: 在基因组注入、PGD 状态注入和 SSD 结构化提取上进行了实证评估，具体结果见摘要。
limitations: 实验仅在特定预训练检查点上验证，泛化性需进一步研究。
认知风险假设未进行实证验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首次系统分析状态空间模型（SSM）的安全、安保与认知风险，提出三类新型攻击并验证其有效性。

papers.title: SymphoMotion: Joint Control of Camera Motion and Object Dynamics for Coherent Video Generation
papers.abstract: Controlling both camera motion and object dynamics is essential for coherent and expressive video generation, yet current methods typically handle only one motion type or rely on ambiguous 2D cues that entangle camera-induced parallax with true object movement. We present SymphoMotion, a unified motion-control framework that jointly governs camera trajectories and object dynamics within a single model. SymphoMotion features a Camera Trajectory Control mechanism that integrates explicit camera paths with geometry-aware cues to ensure stable, structurally consistent viewpoint transitions, and an Object Dynamics Control mechanism that combines 2D visual guidance with 3D trajectory embeddings to enable depth-aware, spatially coherent object manipulation. To support large-scale training and evaluation, we further construct RealCOD-25K, a comprehensive real-world dataset containing paired camera poses and object-level 3D trajectories across diverse indoor and outdoor scenes, addressing a key data gap in unified motion control. Extensive experiments and user studies show that SymphoMotion significantly outperforms existing methods in visual fidelity, camera controllability, and object-motion accuracy, establishing a new benchmark for unified motion control in video generation. Codes and data are publicly available at https://grenoble-zhang.github.io/SymphoMotion/.

analysis.tldr: SymphoMotion 提出统一控制相机运动与物体动态的视频生成框架，并构建了配套数据集 RealCOD-25K。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频生成方法通常只能控制单一运动类型（相机或物体），或依赖模糊的2D线索导致相机视差与真实物体运动混淆，缺乏统一且精确的运动控制方案。
analysis.problem: 如何在一个视频生成模型中同时精确控制相机轨迹和物体动态，并解决训练数据缺失问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 SymphoMotion 框架，包含相机轨迹控制（显式相机路径+几何感知线索）和物体动态控制（2D视觉引导+3D轨迹嵌入）两个模块，并构建真实世界数据集 RealCOD-25K。
contributions: 提出统一控制相机运动和物体动态的视频生成框架 SymphoMotion。
构建包含配对相机位姿和物体3D轨迹的真实世界数据集 RealCOD-25K。
analysis.experiments: 在多个指标上（视觉保真度、相机可控性、物体运动精度）显著优于现有方法，并通过用户研究验证。
limitations: 可能对复杂场景或长视频的泛化能力有限。
数据集规模（25K）可能不足以覆盖所有运动模式。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SymphoMotion 提出统一控制相机运动与物体动态的视频生成框架，并构建了配套数据集 RealCOD-25K。

papers.title: CGHair: Compact Gaussian Hair Reconstruction with Card Clustering
papers.abstract: We present a compact pipeline for high-fidelity hair reconstruction from multi-view images. While recent 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) methods achieve realistic results, they often require millions of primitives, leading to high storage and rendering costs. Observing that hair exhibits structural and visual similarities across a hairstyle, we cluster strands into representative hair cards and group these into shared texture codebooks. Our approach integrates this structure with 3DGS rendering, significantly reducing reconstruction time and storage while maintaining comparable visual quality. In addition, we propose a generative prior accelerated method to reconstruct the initial strand geometry from a set of images. Our experiments demonstrate a 4-fold reduction in strand reconstruction time and achieve comparable rendering performance with over 200x lower memory footprint.

analysis.tldr: 提出紧凑高斯头发重建方法，通过发卡聚类和共享纹理码本，实现200倍以上存储压缩且保持视觉质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有3D高斯泼溅方法重建头发需要数百万图元，导致高存储和渲染成本，限制了实际应用。
analysis.problem: 如何从多视角图像高效重建高保真头发，同时大幅降低存储和渲染开销。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 头发在结构和视觉上具有相似性，可聚类为代表性发卡并共享纹理码本。
analysis.method: 将发丝聚类为发卡，分组为共享纹理码本，并集成到3DGS渲染中；使用生成先验加速初始发丝几何重建。
contributions: 提出基于发卡聚类和共享纹理码本的紧凑头发重建管线，显著降低存储和渲染成本。
提出生成先验加速方法，将发丝重建时间减少4倍。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明，发丝重建时间减少4倍，渲染性能相当，内存占用降低200倍以上。
limitations: 可能依赖多视角输入质量，极端发型或遮挡场景效果未知。
共享码本可能限制细节多样性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出紧凑高斯头发重建方法，通过发卡聚类和共享纹理码本，实现200倍以上存储压缩且保持视觉质量。

papers.title: 15 Years of Augmented Human(s) Research: Where Do We Stand?
papers.abstract: The Augmented Human vision broadly seeks to improve or expand baseline human functioning through the restoration or extension of physical, intellectual, and social capabilities. However, given the rapid pace of technology development, we ask: what exactly does Augmented Human research involve, what are its core themes, and how has the Augmented Human(s) conference series evolved over time? To answer this, we conducted a scientometric analysis on the past 15 years of the Augmented Human(s) conference (N=735 paper), focusing on: geographical aspects, submissions and citation timelines, author frequency and popularity, and topic modeling. We find that: (a) Number of papers in the conference exhibit a bimodal distribution, peaking in 2015 and 2025, but showing periods of stagnant growth; (b) key topics over time include Haptics, Wearable Sensing, Vision & Eye Tracking, Embodied Interaction, and Sports / Motion; (c) some seminal papers on AH are not published in AH(s), but rather at related venues (e.g., CHI); (d) the conference has an active Japanese HCI community despite its historical Eurocentric location dominance. We contribute a closer look at the trajectory of the AH(s) field, and raise considerations of definitional and research scope ambiguities given the core problems/enhancements the field seeks to address.

analysis.tldr: 对Augmented Human(s)会议15年论文的科学计量分析，揭示其主题演变、地理分布和引用模式。
analysis.research_motivation: Augmented Human研究快速发展，但缺乏对其核心主题、演变趋势和会议影响力的系统分析。
analysis.problem: 梳理Augmented Human(s)会议15年来的研究主题、地理分布、作者网络和引用模式，并探讨领域定义和范围的模糊性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 论文数量呈双峰分布（2015和2025年峰值），增长有停滞期；关键主题包括触觉、可穿戴传感、视觉与眼动追踪、具身交互、运动；重要论文常发表在CHI等其他会议；日本HCI社区活跃但会议历史上以欧洲为中心。
analysis.method: 对735篇会议论文进行科学计量分析，包括地理分布、投稿与引用时间线、作者频率与流行度、主题建模。
contributions: 提供了Augmented Human(s)会议15年发展的系统概览
揭示了领域主题演变和地理分布特征
指出了定义和研究范围的模糊性问题
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅描述了分析方法和发现。
limitations: 仅基于单一会议论文，可能无法完全代表整个领域
科学计量分析本身有局限性，如主题建模的语义覆盖
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 对Augmented Human(s)会议15年论文的科学计量分析，揭示其主题演变、地理分布和引用模式。

papers.title: Learning Superpixel Ensemble and Hierarchy Graphs for Melanoma Detection
papers.abstract: Graph signal processing (GSP) is becoming a major tool in biomedical signal and image analysis. In most GSP techniques, graph structures and edge weights have been typically set via statistical and computational methods. More recently, graph structure learning methods offered more reliable and flexible data representations. In this work, we introduce a graph learning approach for melanoma detection in dermoscopic images based on two graph-theoretic representations: superpixel ensemble graphs (SEG) and superpixel hierarchy graphs (SHG). For these two types of graphs, superpixel maps of a skin lesion image are respectively generated at multiple levels without and with parentchild constraints among superpixels at adjacent levels, where each level corresponds to a subgraph with a different number of nodes (20, 40, 60, 80, or 100 nodes). Two edge weight assignment techniques are explored: handcrafted Gaussian weights and learned weights based on optimization methods. The graph nodal signals are assigned based on texture, geometric, and color superpixel features. In addition, the effect of graph edge thresholding is investigated by applying different thresholds (25%, 50%, and 75%) to prune the weakest edges and analyze the impact of pruning on the melanoma detection performance. Experimental evaluation of the proposed method is performed with different classifiers trained and tested on the publicly available ISIC2017 dataset. Data augmentation is applied to alleviate class imbalance by adding more melanoma images from the ISIC archive. The results show that learned superpixel ensemble graphs with textural nodal signals give the highest performance reaching an accuracy of 99.00% and an AUC of 99.59%.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于超像素集成图与层次图的图学习方法，用于皮肤镜图像黑色素瘤检测，在ISIC2017上达到99.00%准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 图信号处理在生物医学图像分析中日益重要，但传统图结构依赖统计方法，缺乏灵活性和可靠性；图结构学习能提供更优的数据表示，但尚未充分应用于黑色素瘤检测。
analysis.problem: 如何利用图结构学习构建有效的超像素图表示，提升皮肤镜图像中黑色素瘤检测的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出两种图表示：超像素集成图（SEG）和超像素层次图（SHG），在多个超像素级别（20/40/60/80/100节点）构建子图，探索手工高斯权重和基于优化的学习权重两种边权重分配，并基于纹理、几何和颜色特征分配节点信号，同时研究边阈值剪枝的影响。
contributions: 首次将超像素集成图和层次图用于黑色素瘤检测，并系统比较了不同图结构、边权重和节点特征的效果。
在ISIC2017数据集上达到99.00%准确率和99.59% AUC，验证了学习权重和纹理特征的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在ISIC2017数据集上使用多种分类器进行训练和测试，采用数据增强缓解类别不平衡，比较了不同图类型、边权重、节点特征和阈值剪枝的性能。
limitations: 仅使用单一数据集ISIC2017，泛化性有待验证。
方法依赖超像素分割质量，可能受图像噪声影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于超像素集成图与层次图的图学习方法，用于皮肤镜图像黑色素瘤检测，在ISIC2017上达到99.00%准确率。

papers.title: RDEx-CMOP: Feasibility-Aware Indicator-Guided Differential Evolution for Fixed-Budget Constrained Multiobjective Optimization
papers.abstract: Constrained multiobjective optimisation requires fast feasibility attainment together with stable convergence and diversity preservation under strict evaluation budgets. This report documents RDEx-CMOP, the differential evolution variant used in the IEEE CEC 2025 numerical optimisation competition (C06 special session) constrained multiobjective track. RDEx-CMOP integrates an ε-level feasibility schedule, a SPEA2-style indicator-driven fitness assignment, and a fitness-oriented current-to-pbest/1 mutation operator. We evaluate RDEx-CMOP on the official CEC 2025 CMOP benchmark using the median-target U-score framework and the released trace data. Experimental results show that RDEx-CMOP achieves the highest total score and the best overall average rank among all released comparison algorithms, with strong target-attainment behaviour and near-zero final violation on most problems.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种面向固定预算约束多目标优化的可行性感知差分进化算法，在CEC 2025竞赛基准上取得最佳平均排名。
analysis.research_motivation: 约束多目标优化需要在严格评估预算下快速实现可行性、收敛性和多样性，现有方法在预算受限时难以平衡这些目标。
analysis.problem: 在固定评估预算下，如何设计高效的约束多目标优化算法以同时实现快速可行性、稳定收敛和多样性保持。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 集成ε-水平可行性调度、SPEA2风格指标驱动适应度分配和适应度导向的current-to-pbest/1变异算子的差分进化算法。
contributions: 提出RDEx-CMOP算法，融合可行性感知机制和指标引导的进化策略。
在CEC 2025 CMOP基准上通过中位数目标U-score框架验证，取得最高总分和最佳平均排名。
analysis.experiments: 在CEC 2025 CMOP官方基准上使用中位数目标U-score框架和发布轨迹数据评估，与所有发布对比算法相比，RDEx-CMOP获得最高总分和最佳平均排名，在大多数问题上实现近零最终违反。
limitations: 可能对ε参数敏感，需要调参。
仅在特定基准上验证，泛化性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: optimization
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种面向固定预算约束多目标优化的可行性感知差分进化算法，在CEC 2025竞赛基准上取得最佳平均排名。

papers.title: XSeg: A Large-scale X-ray Contraband Segmentation Benchmark For Real-World Security Screening
papers.abstract: X-ray contraband detection is critical for public safety. However, current methods primarily rely on bounding box annotations, which limit model generalization and performance due to the lack of pixel-level supervision and real-world data. To address these limitations, we introduce XSeg. To the best of our knowledge, XSeg is the largest X-ray contraband segmentation dataset to date, including 98,644 images and 295,932 instance masks, and contains the latest 30 common contraband categories. The images are sourced from public datasets and our synthesized data, filtered through a custom data cleaning pipeline to remove low-quality samples. To enable accurate and efficient annotation and reduce manual labeling effort, we propose Adaptive Point SAM (APSAM), a specialized mask annotation model built upon the Segment Anything Model (SAM). We address SAM's poor cross-domain generalization and limited capability in detecting stacked objects by introducing an Energy-Aware Encoder that enhances the initialization of the mask decoder, significantly improving sensitivity to overlapping items. Additionally, we design an Adaptive Point Generator that allows users to obtain precise mask labels with only a single coarse point prompt. Extensive experiments on XSeg demonstrate the superior performance of APSAM.

analysis.tldr: XSeg 是最大的 X 光违禁品分割数据集，并提出 APSAM 模型实现高效标注。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 X 光违禁品检测主要依赖边界框标注，缺乏像素级监督和真实世界数据，限制了模型泛化性和性能。
analysis.problem: 构建大规模、高质量的 X 光违禁品分割数据集，并解决现有分割模型（如 SAM）在 X 光图像上跨域泛化差、对堆叠物体检测能力有限的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出 SAM 在 X 光图像上跨域泛化差，且对堆叠物体检测能力有限。
analysis.method: 提出 XSeg 数据集（98,644 张图像，295,932 个实例掩码）和 Adaptive Point SAM (APSAM) 模型，后者通过能量感知编码器增强掩码解码器初始化，并设计自适应点生成器实现单点提示精确标注。
contributions: 构建了目前最大的 X 光违禁品分割数据集 XSeg，包含 98,644 张图像和 295,932 个实例掩码，覆盖 30 类违禁品。
提出 APSAM 模型，通过能量感知编码器和自适应点生成器，解决了 SAM 在 X 光图像上的跨域泛化和堆叠物体检测问题。
analysis.experiments: 在 XSeg 数据集上进行了大量实验，验证了 APSAM 的优越性能。
limitations: 数据集可能仍存在类别不平衡问题。
APSAM 依赖 SAM 架构，计算成本可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: XSeg 是最大的 X 光违禁品分割数据集，并提出 APSAM 模型实现高效标注。

papers.title: VidNum-1.4K: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Video-based Numerical Reasoning
papers.abstract: Video-based numerical reasoning provides a premier arena for testing whether Vision-Language Models (VLMs) truly "understand" real-world dynamics, as accurate numerical deduction necessitates a profound grasp of temporal events, object permanence, and compositional logic beyond superficial pattern matching. However, existing benchmarks are often confined to narrow domains, such as repetitive athletic motions, or treat simple counting merely as a superficial regression task, failing to assess multi-step numerical logic within the inherent complexity of real-world multimedia content. We introduce VidNum-1.4K, a comprehensive VideoQA benchmark comprising 1,379 strictly human-annotated video-question pairs designed to evaluate genuine numerical reasoning across highly diverse environments, encompassing object, action, and event quantification. The VidNum-1.4K is uniquely structured into a three-level hierarchy that evolves from direct visual perception to video-based compositional numerical reasoning, requiring models to perform arithmetic operations, comparisons, and logical deductions grounded in temporal evidence. Our evaluations across a diverse suite of state-of-the-art VLMs reveal a striking reasoning gap: while the Gemini-3.1-pro barely reaches a 60% accuracy threshold, representative open-source families struggle heavily in the 25%--45% range. These findings demonstrate that current VLMs still lack a stable "internal world model", positioning VidNum-1.4K as a demanding diagnostic testbed for the next generation of numerical video intelligence.

analysis.tldr: 提出VidNum-1.4K视频数值推理基准，揭示当前VLM在时序数值推理上的严重不足。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频数值推理基准局限于狭窄领域或简单计数任务，无法评估模型在真实世界复杂场景中的多步数值逻辑推理能力。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个覆盖多样化环境、包含层次化数值推理难度、且严格人工标注的视频问答基准，以系统评估VLM的数值推理能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 当前VLM在数值推理上存在显著差距：最强闭源模型Gemini-3.1-pro仅达60%准确率，开源模型在25%-45%区间，表明模型缺乏稳定的内部世界模型。
analysis.method: 构建包含1,379个严格人工标注视频-问答对的VidNum-1.4K基准，设计三级层次结构（从直接视觉感知到基于视频的组合数值推理），要求模型执行算术运算、比较和逻辑推理。
contributions: 提出了VidNum-1.4K，一个大规模、多样化、严格人工标注的视频数值推理基准。
设计了三级层次化推理难度结构，系统评估从感知到组合推理的数值能力。
通过广泛评估揭示当前VLM在数值推理上的严重不足，为未来研究提供诊断工具。
analysis.experiments: 在多种SOTA VLM上评估，包括Gemini-3.1-pro和多个开源模型，结果显示最强模型仅达60%准确率，开源模型在25%-45%范围。
limitations: 基准规模相对较小（1,379对），可能无法覆盖所有数值推理场景。
仅关注数值推理，未涉及其他推理类型如因果或常识推理。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出VidNum-1.4K视频数值推理基准，揭示当前VLM在时序数值推理上的严重不足。

papers.title: SGTA: Scene-Graph Based Multi-Modal Traffic Agent for Video Understanding
papers.abstract: We present Scene-Graph Based Multi-Modal Traffic Agent (SGTA), a modular framework for traffic video understanding that combines structured scene graphs with multi-modal reasoning. It constructs a traffic scene graph from roadside videos using detection, tracking, and lane extraction, followed by tool-based reasoning over both symbolic graph queries and visual inputs. SGTA adopts ReAct to process interleaved reasoning traces from large language models with tool invocations, enabling interpretable decision-making for complex video questions. Experiments on selected TUMTraffic VideoQA dataset sample demonstrate that SGTA achieves competitive accuracy across multiple question types while providing transparent reasoning steps. These results highlight the potential of integrating structured scene representations with multi-modal agents for traffic video understanding.

analysis.tldr: SGTA 结合场景图与多模态推理，实现可解释的交通视频理解。
analysis.research_motivation: 交通视频理解需要结构化场景表示与可解释推理，现有方法缺乏对复杂视频问题的透明决策能力。
analysis.problem: 如何将结构化场景图与多模态推理结合，提升交通视频问答的准确性和可解释性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建交通场景图（检测、跟踪、车道提取），结合 ReAct 框架进行符号图查询与视觉输入的工具化推理。
contributions: 提出 SGTA 模块化框架，融合场景图与多模态推理。
在 TUMTraffic VideoQA 数据集上展示竞争性准确率和透明推理步骤。
analysis.experiments: 在 TUMTraffic VideoQA 数据集样本上测试，多个问题类型取得竞争性准确率。
limitations: 仅在单一数据集样本上验证，泛化性未知。
场景图构建依赖检测和跟踪精度，可能影响鲁棒性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SGTA 结合场景图与多模态推理，实现可解释的交通视频理解。

papers.title: FunFact: Building Probabilistic Functional 3D Scene Graphs via Factor-Graph Reasoning
papers.abstract: Recent work in 3D scene understanding is moving beyond purely spatial analysis toward functional scene understanding. However, existing methods often consider functional relationships between object pairs in isolation, failing to capture the scene-wide interdependence that humans use to resolve ambiguity. We introduce FunFact, a framework for constructing probabilistic open-vocabulary functional 3D scene graphs from posed RGB-D images. FunFact first builds an object- and part-centric 3D map and uses foundation models to propose semantically plausible functional relations. These candidates are converted into factor graph variables and constrained by both LLM-derived common-sense priors and geometric priors. This formulation enables joint probabilistic inference over all functional edges and their marginals, yielding substantially better calibrated confidence scores. To benchmark this setting, we introduce FunThor, a synthetic dataset based on AI2-THOR with part-level geometry and rule-based functional annotations. Experiments on SceneFun3D, FunGraph3D, and FunThor show that FunFact improves node and relation discovery recall and significantly reduces calibration error for ambiguous relations, highlighting the benefits of holistic probabilistic modeling for functional scene understanding. See our project page at https://funfact-scenegraph.github.io/

analysis.tldr: FunFact通过因子图推理构建概率化开放词汇功能3D场景图，提升功能关系发现的召回率与校准性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有3D场景理解方法通常孤立地考虑物体对之间的功能关系，未能捕捉人类用于消解歧义的全场景相互依赖关系，导致功能关系发现不准确且置信度校准差。
analysis.problem: 如何从RGB-D图像中构建概率化、开放词汇的功能3D场景图，并实现全局联合推理以提升功能关系发现的准确性和置信度校准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: FunFact首先构建以物体和部件为中心的3D地图，利用基础模型提出语义上合理的功能关系候选；然后将这些候选转换为因子图变量，并由LLM常识先验和几何先验共同约束，实现对所有功能边及其边缘概率的联合概率推理。
contributions: 提出FunFact框架，通过因子图推理实现概率化开放词汇功能3D场景图的构建。
引入FunThor合成数据集，提供部件级几何和基于规则的功能标注，用于基准测试。
在SceneFun3D、FunGraph3D和FunThor上实验表明，FunFact提升了节点和关系发现的召回率，并显著降低了模糊关系的校准误差。
analysis.experiments: 在SceneFun3D、FunGraph3D和FunThor三个数据集上评估，FunFact在节点和关系发现召回率上优于基线，并显著降低了模糊关系的校准误差。
limitations: 依赖基础模型和LLM先验，可能引入噪声或偏见。
合成数据集FunThor与真实场景存在域差异，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: FunFact通过因子图推理构建概率化开放词汇功能3D场景图，提升功能关系发现的召回率与校准性能。

papers.title: ResGuard: Enhancing Robustness Against Known Original Attacks in Deep Watermarking
papers.abstract: Deep learning-based image watermarking commonly adopts an "Encoder-Noise Layer-Decoder" (END) architecture to improve robustness against random channel distortions, yet it often overlooks intentional manipulations introduced by adversaries with additional knowledge. In this paper, we revisit this paradigm and expose a critical yet underexplored vulnerability: the Known Original Attack (KOA), where an adversary has access to multiple original-watermarked image pairs, enabling various targeted suppression strategies. We show that even a simple residual-based removal approach, namely estimating an embedding residual from known pairs and subtracting it from unseen watermarked images, can almost completely remove the watermark while preserving visual quality. This vulnerability stems from the insufficient image dependency of residuals produced by END frameworks, which makes them transferable across images. To address this, we propose ResGuard, a plug-and-play module that enhances KOA robustness by enforcing image-dependent embedding. Its core lies in a residual specificity enhancement loss, which encourages residuals to be tightly coupled with their host images and thus improves image dependency. Furthermore, an auxiliary KOA noise layer injects residual-style perturbations during training, allowing the decoder to remain reliable under stronger embedding inconsistencies. Integrated into existing frameworks, ResGuard boosts KOA robustness, improving average watermark extraction accuracy from 59.87% to 99.81%.

analysis.tldr: ResGuard通过增强残差图像依赖性，将深度水印对已知原始攻击的提取准确率从59.87%提升至99.81%。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有深度水印方法主要针对随机信道失真设计，忽略了拥有原始-水印图像对的对手发起的已知原始攻击（KOA），这种攻击能几乎完全移除水印，构成严重安全威胁。
analysis.problem: 解决深度水印框架在已知原始攻击（KOA）下鲁棒性不足的问题，即残差跨图像可转移导致水印易被移除。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出END框架产生的残差图像依赖性不足，使得残差在不同图像间可转移，从而被对手利用进行简单残差减法即可移除水印。
analysis.method: 提出ResGuard模块，包含残差特异性增强损失（强制残差与宿主图像紧密耦合）和辅助KOA噪声层（训练时注入残差风格扰动），增强图像依赖性并提升解码器鲁棒性。
contributions: 首次揭示并系统分析了深度水印中的已知原始攻击（KOA）漏洞。
提出ResGuard即插即用模块，通过增强残差图像依赖性显著提升KOA鲁棒性，将提取准确率从59.87%提升至99.81%。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验设置，但报告了平均水印提取准确率从59.87%提升至99.81%。
limitations: 可能仅针对特定类型的已知原始攻击有效，对其他未知攻击的泛化性未知。
ResGuard模块可能增加计算开销或影响水印不可见性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ResGuard通过增强残差图像依赖性，将深度水印对已知原始攻击的提取准确率从59.87%提升至99.81%。

papers.title: Fusion and Alignment Enhancement with Large Language Models for Tail-item Sequential Recommendation
papers.abstract: Sequential Recommendation (SR) learns user preferences from their historical interaction sequences and provides personalized suggestions. In real-world scenarios, most items exhibit sparse interactions, known as the tail-item problem. This issue limits the model's ability to accurately capture item transition patterns. To tackle this, large language models (LLMs) offer a promising solution by capturing semantic relationships between items. Despite previous efforts to leverage LLM-derived embeddings for enriching tail items, they still face the following limitations: 1) They struggle to effectively fuse collaborative signals with semantic knowledge, leading to suboptimal item embedding quality. 2) Existing methods overlook the structural inconsistency between the ID and LLM embedding spaces, causing conflicting signals that degrade recommendation accuracy. In this work, we propose a Fusion and Alignment Enhancement framework with LLMs for Tail-item Sequential Recommendation (FAERec), which improves item representations by generating coherently-fused and structurally consistent embeddings. For the information fusion challenge, we design an adaptive gating mechanism that dynamically fuses ID and LLM embeddings. Then, we propose a dual-level alignment approach to mitigate structural inconsistency. The item-level alignment establishes correspondences between ID and LLM embeddings of the same item through contrastive learning, while the feature-level alignment constrains the correlation patterns between corresponding dimensions across the two embedding spaces. Furthermore, the weights of the two alignments are adjusted by a curriculum learning scheduler to avoid premature optimization of the complex feature-level objective. Extensive experiments across three widely used datasets with multiple representative SR backbones demonstrate the effectiveness and generalizability of our framework.

analysis.tldr: 提出融合与对齐增强框架FAERec，利用LLM改善序列推荐中尾部物品的表示质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现实场景中大多数物品交互稀疏（尾部物品问题），导致模型难以准确捕捉物品转移模式；现有方法融合协同信号与语义知识效果不佳，且ID与LLM嵌入空间存在结构不一致，影响推荐精度。
analysis.problem: 如何有效融合ID嵌入与LLM语义嵌入，并解决两个嵌入空间的结构不一致性，以提升尾部物品的表示质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出：1) 现有方法难以有效融合协同信号与语义知识，导致物品嵌入质量次优；2) ID与LLM嵌入空间存在结构不一致，产生冲突信号，降低推荐准确性。
analysis.method: 提出FAERec框架，包含自适应门控机制动态融合ID和LLM嵌入，以及双层级对齐（物品级对比学习+特征级相关性约束）缓解结构不一致，并通过课程学习调度器调整对齐权重。
contributions: 提出自适应门控机制动态融合ID和LLM嵌入，提升尾部物品表示质量。
提出双层级对齐方法（物品级和特征级）缓解嵌入空间结构不一致，并引入课程学习调度器优化训练。
analysis.experiments: 在三个广泛使用的数据集上，结合多个代表性序列推荐骨干网络进行实验，验证了框架的有效性和泛化性。
limitations: 可能依赖LLM的语义质量，若LLM对特定领域理解不足则效果受限。
双层级对齐增加了计算复杂度，可能影响训练效率。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出融合与对齐增强框架FAERec，利用LLM改善序列推荐中尾部物品的表示质量。

papers.title: SciLT: Long-tailed Image Classification under Scientific Image Domains
papers.abstract: Long-tailed recognition has benefited from foundation models and fine-tuning paradigms, yet existing studies and benchmarks are mainly confined to natural image domains, where pre-training and fine-tuning data share similar distributions. In contrast, scientific images exhibit distinct visual characteristics and supervision signals, raising questions about the effectiveness of fine-tuning foundation models in such settings. In this work, we investigate scientific long-tailed recognition under a purely visual and fine-tuning paradigm. Experiments on three scientific benchmarks show that fine-tuning foundation models yields limited gains, and reveal that penultimate-layer features play an important role, particularly for tail classes. Motivated by these findings, we propose SciLT, a framework that exploits multi-level representations through adaptive feature fusion and dual-supervision learning. By jointly leveraging penultimate- and final-layer features, SciLT achieves balanced performance across head and tail classes. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SciLT consistently outperforms existing methods, establishing a strong and practical baseline for scientific long-tailed recognition and providing valuable guidance for adapting foundation models to scientific data with substantial domain shifts.

analysis.tldr: 提出SciLT框架，通过自适应特征融合和双监督学习提升科学图像长尾分类性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有长尾识别研究主要针对自然图像，预训练与微调数据分布相似；而科学图像具有独特视觉特征和监督信号，微调基础模型效果有限，亟需针对科学领域的长尾识别方法。
analysis.problem: 科学图像领域的长尾分类问题，即如何有效微调基础模型以处理科学图像中类别分布不均衡且与自然图像存在领域差异的情况。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验发现微调基础模型在科学图像上增益有限，且倒数第二层特征对尾部类别尤为重要。
analysis.method: 提出SciLT框架，通过自适应特征融合和双监督学习，联合利用倒数第二层和最后一层特征，实现头部和尾部类别的平衡性能。
contributions: 揭示了科学图像长尾识别中微调基础模型的局限性以及倒数第二层特征的重要性。
提出了SciLT框架，通过多层级表示的自适应融合和双监督学习，显著提升科学长尾分类性能。
analysis.experiments: 在三个科学图像基准上进行了实验，SciLT一致优于现有方法，建立了强基线。
limitations: 可能仅适用于纯视觉微调范式，未探索多模态或预训练策略。
自适应特征融合的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SciLT框架，通过自适应特征融合和双监督学习提升科学图像长尾分类性能。

papers.title: DSERT-RoLL: Robust Multi-Modal Perception for Diverse Driving Conditions with Stereo Event-RGB-Thermal Cameras, 4D Radar, and Dual-LiDAR
papers.abstract: In this paper, we present DSERT-RoLL, a driving dataset that incorporates stereo event, RGB, and thermal cameras together with 4D radar and dual LiDAR, collected across diverse weather and illumination conditions. The dataset provides precise 2D and 3D bounding boxes with track IDs and ego vehicle odometry, enabling fair comparisons within and across sensor combinations. It is designed to alleviate data scarcity for novel sensors such as event cameras and 4D radar and to support systematic studies of their behavior. We establish unified 3D and 2D benchmarks that enable direct comparison of characteristics and strengths across sensor families and within each family. We report baselines for representative single modality and multimodal methods and provide protocols that encourage research on different fusion strategies and sensor combinations. In addition, we propose a fusion framework that integrates sensor specific cues into a unified feature space and improves 3D detection robustness under varied weather and lighting.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个包含立体事件相机、RGB、热成像、4D雷达和双LiDAR的多模态驾驶数据集DSERT-RoLL，并建立统一基准和融合框架以提升恶劣天气下的3D检测鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有自动驾驶数据集缺乏新型传感器（如事件相机、4D雷达）的联合标注，且难以支持跨传感器组合的公平比较，限制了多模态感知在复杂天气和光照条件下的鲁棒性研究。
analysis.problem: 解决新型传感器数据稀缺问题，并建立统一基准以系统研究不同传感器特性及融合策略，提升恶劣天气下的3D目标检测鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建包含立体事件、RGB、热成像、4D雷达和双LiDAR的多模态数据集，提供精确2D/3D标注和里程计；建立统一3D和2D基准；提出融合框架将传感器特定特征映射到统一特征空间。
contributions: 提出DSERT-RoLL数据集，覆盖多种天气和光照条件，包含立体事件、RGB、热成像、4D雷达和双LiDAR。
建立统一3D和2D基准，支持跨传感器组合的公平比较。
提出多模态融合框架，提升恶劣天气下3D检测鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 数据集规模可能有限，未提及具体样本数量。
融合框架的泛化性未在摘要中验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个包含立体事件相机、RGB、热成像、4D雷达和双LiDAR的多模态驾驶数据集DSERT-RoLL，并建立统一基准和融合框架以提升恶劣天气下的3D检测鲁棒性。

papers.title: LightThinker++: From Reasoning Compression to Memory Management
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) excel at complex reasoning, yet their efficiency is limited by the surging cognitive overhead of long thought traces. In this paper, we propose LightThinker, a method that enables LLMs to dynamically compress intermediate thoughts into compact semantic representations. However, static compression often struggles with complex reasoning where the irreversible loss of intermediate details can lead to logical bottlenecks. To address this, we evolve the framework into LightThinker++, introducing Explicit Adaptive Memory Management. This paradigm shifts to behavioral-level management by incorporating explicit memory primitives, supported by a specialized trajectory synthesis pipeline to train purposeful memory scheduling. Extensive experiments demonstrate the framework's versatility across three dimensions. (1) LightThinker reduces peak token usage by 70% and inference time by 26% with minimal accuracy loss. (2) In standard reasoning, LightThinker++ slashes peak token usage by 69.9% while yielding a +2.42% accuracy gain under the same context budget for maximum performance. (3) Most notably, in long-horizon agentic tasks, it maintains a stable footprint beyond 80 rounds (a 60%-70% reduction), achieving an average performance gain of 14.8% across different complex scenarios. Overall, our work provides a scalable direction for sustaining deep LLM reasoning over extended horizons with minimal overhead.

analysis.tldr: 提出LightThinker和LightThinker++，通过动态压缩中间推理步骤和显式自适应内存管理，大幅降低LLM推理的token开销和延迟，同时保持或提升性能。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在复杂推理中产生长思维链，导致认知开销激增，效率低下。现有方法如静态压缩在复杂推理中会丢失中间细节，造成逻辑瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲推理质量的前提下，有效压缩LLM的中间推理步骤，并管理长程推理中的内存占用。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 静态压缩在复杂推理中因不可逆的中间细节丢失导致逻辑瓶颈；长程agent任务中内存占用随轮次线性增长。
analysis.method: LightThinker通过动态压缩中间思维为紧凑语义表示；LightThinker++引入显式自适应内存管理，使用显式内存原语和专用轨迹合成管道训练有目的的内存调度。
contributions: 提出LightThinker，实现动态压缩中间推理步骤，减少70%峰值token和26%推理时间，精度损失极小。
提出LightThinker++，引入显式自适应内存管理，在标准推理中减少69.9%峰值token并提升2.42%准确率，在长程agent任务中稳定内存占用并平均提升14.8%性能。
analysis.experiments: 在标准推理和长程agent任务上评估，报告了峰值token使用、推理时间、准确率等指标。
limitations: 可能对极长推理链的压缩效果有限。
内存管理策略的通用性可能受限于特定任务类型。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出LightThinker和LightThinker++，通过动态压缩中间推理步骤和显式自适应内存管理，大幅降低LLM推理的token开销和延迟，同时保持或提升性能。

papers.title: Unlocking Prompt Infilling Capability for Diffusion Language Models
papers.abstract: Masked diffusion language models (dLMs) generate text through bidirectional denoising, yet this capability remains locked for infilling prompts. This limitation is an artifact of the current supervised finetuning (SFT) convention of applying response-only masking. To unlock this capability, we extend full-sequence masking during SFT, where both prompts and responses are masked jointly. Once unlocked, the model infills masked portions of a prompt template conditioned on few-shot examples. We show that such model-infilled prompts match or surpass manually designed templates, transfer effectively across models, and are complementary to existing prompt optimization methods. Our results suggest that training practices, not architectural limitations, are the primary bottleneck preventing masked diffusion language models from infilling effective prompts

analysis.tldr: 通过改变监督微调中的掩码策略，解锁扩散语言模型的提示填充能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散语言模型具备双向去噪能力，但现有监督微调方法仅对响应部分进行掩码，导致其无法有效填充提示中的缺失部分，限制了其在少样本提示优化中的应用。
analysis.problem: 如何解锁扩散语言模型的提示填充能力，使其能够基于少样本示例填充提示模板中的掩码部分。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，训练实践（而非架构限制）是阻碍扩散语言模型填充有效提示的主要瓶颈，具体表现为当前监督微调中仅对响应掩码的惯例。
analysis.method: 在监督微调阶段采用全序列掩码（同时掩码提示和响应），使模型学会填充提示中的掩码部分。
contributions: 提出全序列掩码的监督微调方法，解锁扩散语言模型的提示填充能力。
实验证明模型填充的提示可匹配或超越人工设计的模板，且跨模型迁移有效，与现有提示优化方法互补。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的扩散语言模型。
全序列掩码可能增加训练复杂度或影响生成质量。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过改变监督微调中的掩码策略，解锁扩散语言模型的提示填充能力。

papers.title: OASES: Outcome-Aligned Search-Evaluation Co-Training for Agentic Search
papers.abstract: Agentic search enables language models to solve knowledge-intensive tasks by adaptively acquiring external evidence over multiple steps. Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has emerged as a widely adopted training paradigm for search agents, yet outcome-only rewards are sparse and provide limited credit assignment for intermediate search actions. Existing process-reward methods therefore seek to densify supervision through proxy signals, external evaluators, or likelihood-based information gain. However, proxy rewards can deviate from the final outcome objective, while fixed evaluators can become stale as the search policy evolves, leading to unreliable process supervision. To address these challenges, we propose OASES, an Outcome-Aligned Search-Evaluation Supervision framework for agentic search. OASES derives outcome-aligned process rewards by evaluating how well each intermediate search state supports answering the original question. It further co-trains the search policy and the state evaluator on policy, allowing the evaluator to adapt to evolving search behavior and provide more reliable process rewards. Experiments on five multi-hop QA benchmarks show that OASES consistently outperforms strong RL baselines, with further analyses confirming the benefits of outcome-aligned process rewards and search-evaluation co-training.

analysis.tldr: 提出OASES框架，通过结果对齐的过程奖励和搜索-评估协同训练提升智能搜索代理性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有强化学习方法在智能搜索中仅使用稀疏的结果奖励，无法有效分配中间搜索动作的信用；而过程奖励方法依赖代理信号或固定评估器，可能偏离最终目标或过时。
analysis.problem: 如何为智能搜索代理提供可靠且与最终结果对齐的过程奖励，以优化中间搜索行为。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出结果奖励稀疏且信用分配有限，代理信号可能偏离目标，固定评估器随策略演化变得不可靠。
analysis.method: OASES框架：通过评估每个中间搜索状态对回答原始问题的支持程度，推导出与结果对齐的过程奖励；并协同训练搜索策略和状态评估器，使评估器适应搜索行为变化。
contributions: 提出结果对齐的过程奖励机制，解决代理信号与最终目标不一致的问题。
提出搜索-评估协同训练方法，使评估器随策略演化自适应更新。
analysis.experiments: 在五个多跳问答基准上，OASES持续优于强强化学习基线，进一步分析证实了结果对齐过程奖励和协同训练的有效性。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的问题-答案对来定义结果对齐。
协同训练可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出OASES框架，通过结果对齐的过程奖励和搜索-评估协同训练提升智能搜索代理性能。

papers.title: DiffSparse: Accelerating Diffusion Transformers with Learned Token Sparsity
papers.abstract: Diffusion models demonstrate outstanding performance in image generation, but their multi-step inference mechanism requires immense computational cost. Previous works accelerate inference by leveraging layer or token cache techniques to reduce computational cost. However, these methods fail to achieve superior acceleration performance in few-step diffusion transformer models due to inefficient feature caching strategies, manually designed sparsity allocation, and the practice of retaining complete forward computations in several steps in these token cache methods. To tackle these challenges, we propose a differentiable layer-wise sparsity optimization framework for diffusion transformer models, leveraging token caching to reduce token computation costs and enhance acceleration. Our method optimizes layer-wise sparsity allocation in an end-to-end manner through a learnable network combined with a dynamic programming solver. Additionally, our proposed two-stage training strategy eliminates the need for full-step processing in existing methods, further improving efficiency. We conducted extensive experiments on a range of diffusion-transformer models, including DiT-XL/2, PixArt-$α$, FLUX, and Wan2.1. Across these architectures, our method consistently improves efficiency without degrading sample quality. For example, on PixArt-$α$ with 20 sampling steps, we reduce computational cost by $54\%$ while achieving generation metrics that surpass those of the original model, substantially outperforming prior approaches. These results demonstrate that our method delivers large efficiency gains while often improving generation quality.

analysis.tldr: 提出可微层稀疏优化框架，通过可学习网络和动态规划优化扩散Transformer的逐层稀疏分配，结合两阶段训练策略实现高效加速。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散模型多步推理计算成本高，现有缓存方法在少步扩散Transformer中加速效果不佳，原因包括特征缓存策略低效、稀疏分配手工设计以及保留完整前向计算。
analysis.problem: 如何在不降低生成质量的前提下，通过优化层间稀疏分配和缓存策略，显著减少扩散Transformer的计算成本。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有token缓存方法在少步扩散Transformer中加速性能有限，因为手工设计的稀疏分配和保留完整前向计算的步骤导致效率低下。
analysis.method: 提出可微层稀疏优化框架，使用可学习网络结合动态规划求解器端到端优化逐层稀疏分配，并采用两阶段训练策略消除完整步骤处理。
contributions: 提出可微层稀疏优化框架，端到端学习逐层稀疏分配。
设计两阶段训练策略，避免现有方法中的完整前向计算，进一步提升效率。
在多种扩散Transformer模型上验证，显著降低计算成本且不损失生成质量。
analysis.experiments: 在DiT-XL/2、PixArt-α、FLUX和Wan2.1等模型上实验，例如PixArt-α在20步采样中减少54%计算量且生成指标超越原模型。
limitations: 可能依赖特定模型架构，泛化性需进一步验证。
两阶段训练策略可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出可微层稀疏优化框架，通过可学习网络和动态规划优化扩散Transformer的逐层稀疏分配，结合两阶段训练策略实现高效加速。

papers.title: AI Appeals Processor: A Deep Learning Approach to Automated Classification of Citizen Appeals in Government Services
papers.abstract: Government agencies worldwide face growing volumes of citizen appeals, with electronic submissions increasing significantly over recent years. Traditional manual processing averages 20 minutes per appeal with only 67% classification accuracy, creating significant bottlenecks in public service delivery. This paper presents AI Appeals Processor, a microservice-based system that integrates natural language processing and deep learning techniques for automated classification and routing of citizen appeals. We evaluate multiple approaches -- including Bag-of-Words with SVM, TF-IDF with SVM, fastText, Word2Vec with LSTM, and BERT -- on a representative dataset of 10,000 real citizen appeals across three primary categories (complaints, applications, and proposals) and seven thematic domains. Our experiments demonstrate that a Word2Vec+LSTM architecture achieves 78% classification accuracy while reducing processing time by 54%, offering an optimal balance between accuracy and computational efficiency compared to transformer-based models.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于Word2Vec+LSTM的微服务系统，在公民申诉分类中达到78%准确率并减少54%处理时间。
analysis.research_motivation: 政府机构面临大量公民申诉，传统人工处理耗时且准确率低（平均20分钟/件，67%准确率），亟需自动化方案提升效率。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个高效、准确的自动分类系统，对公民申诉进行类别和主题域划分，以减轻人工负担。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建微服务架构系统，集成多种NLP方法（BoW+SVM、TF-IDF+SVM、fastText、Word2Vec+LSTM、BERT），在10,000条真实申诉数据上比较性能，最终选择Word2Vec+LSTM作为最优模型。
contributions: 提出AI Appeals Processor微服务系统，实现公民申诉的自动分类与路由。
系统评估多种NLP方法，发现Word2Vec+LSTM在准确率与效率间取得最佳平衡。
analysis.experiments: 在10,000条真实公民申诉数据集上评估，包含3个主类别和7个主题域，Word2Vec+LSTM达到78%准确率，处理时间减少54%。
limitations: 准确率78%仍有提升空间，可能无法处理复杂或模糊申诉。
仅基于单一数据集，泛化性未验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于Word2Vec+LSTM的微服务系统，在公民申诉分类中达到78%准确率并减少54%处理时间。

papers.title: Leveraging Gaze and Set-of-Mark in VLLMs for Human-Object Interaction Anticipation from Egocentric Videos
papers.abstract: The ability to anticipate human-object interactions is highly desirable in an intelligent assistive system in order to guide users during daily life activities and understand their short and long-term goals. Creating systems with such capabilities requires to approach several complex challenges. This work addresses the problem of human-object interaction anticipation in Egocentric Vision using Vision Large Language Models (VLLMs). We tackle key limitations in existing approaches by improving visual grounding capabilities through Set-of-Mark prompting and understanding user intent via the trajectory formed by the user's most recent gaze fixations. To effectively capture the temporal dynamics immediately preceding the interaction, we further introduce a novel inverse exponential sampling strategy for input video frames. Experiments conducted on the egocentric dataset HD-EPIC demonstrate that our method surpasses state-of-the-art approaches for the considered task, showing its model-agnostic nature.

analysis.tldr: 利用注视轨迹和Set-of-Mark提示增强VLLM的视觉基础，在自我中心视频中实现人-物交互预测。
analysis.research_motivation: 智能辅助系统需要预测人-物交互以指导日常活动，但现有方法在视觉基础和理解用户意图方面存在局限。
analysis.problem: 从自我中心视频中预测即将发生的人-物交互。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 结合Set-of-Mark提示增强视觉基础，利用用户最近注视轨迹理解意图，并引入逆指数采样策略捕捉交互前的时序动态。
contributions: 提出利用注视轨迹和Set-of-Mark提示改进VLLM的视觉基础能力。
引入逆指数采样策略有效捕捉交互前的时序动态。
analysis.experiments: 在HD-EPIC数据集上超越现有方法，且方法具有模型无关性。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量注视数据。
逆指数采样策略的通用性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用注视轨迹和Set-of-Mark提示增强VLLM的视觉基础，在自我中心视频中实现人-物交互预测。

papers.title: TableVision: A Large-Scale Benchmark for Spatially Grounded Reasoning over Complex Hierarchical Tables
papers.abstract: Structured tables are essential for conveying high-density information in professional domains such as finance, healthcare, and scientific research. Despite the progress in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs), reasoning performance remains limited for complex tables with hierarchical layouts. In this paper, we identify a critical Perception Bottleneck through quantitative analysis. We find that as task complexity scales, the number of involved discrete visual regions increases disproportionately. This processing density leads to an internal "Perceptual Overload," where MLLMs struggle to maintain accurate spatial attention during implicit generation. To address this bottleneck, we introduce TableVision, a large-scale, trajectory-aware benchmark designed for spatially grounded reasoning. TableVision stratifies tabular tasks into three cognitive levels (Perception, Reasoning, and Analysis) across 13 sub-categories. By utilizing a rendering-based deterministic grounding pipeline, the dataset explicitly couples multi-step logical deductions with pixel-perfect spatial ground truths, comprising 6,799 high-fidelity reasoning trajectories. Our empirical results, supported by diagnostic probing, demonstrate that explicit spatial constraints significantly recover the reasoning potential of MLLMs. Furthermore, our two-stage decoupled framework achieves a robust 12.3% overall accuracy improvement on the test set. TableVision provides a rigorous testbed and a fresh perspective on the synergy between perception and logic in document understanding.

analysis.tldr: 提出TableVision基准，通过显式空间约束缓解MLLM在复杂表格推理中的感知瓶颈，实现12.3%准确率提升。
analysis.research_motivation: 结构化表格在金融、医疗等专业领域至关重要，但现有MLLM在处理层级复杂表格时推理性能有限，存在感知瓶颈。
analysis.problem: MLLM在复杂表格推理中因感知过载导致空间注意力不准确，需要显式空间约束来提升推理能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 随着任务复杂度增加，涉及的离散视觉区域数量不成比例增长，导致MLLM内部感知过载，难以维持准确的空间注意力。
analysis.method: 构建TableVision基准，包含层级化任务分类（感知、推理、分析三级）和渲染式确定性标注管线，提供像素级空间真值；提出两阶段解耦框架，显式引入空间约束。
contributions: 识别并量化了MLLM在复杂表格推理中的感知瓶颈现象。
构建了TableVision大规模基准，包含6,799条高保真推理轨迹和三级任务分类。
提出两阶段解耦框架，通过显式空间约束在测试集上实现12.3%的整体准确率提升。
analysis.experiments: 在TableVision基准上进行了诊断探针实验，验证了显式空间约束的有效性，并报告了12.3%的准确率提升。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖表格领域，泛化性未验证。
两阶段框架可能增加推理延迟。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出TableVision基准，通过显式空间约束缓解MLLM在复杂表格推理中的感知瓶颈，实现12.3%准确率提升。

papers.title: Love Me, Love My Label: Rethinking the Role of Labels in Prompt Retrieval for Visual In-Context Learning
papers.abstract: Visual in-context learning (VICL) enables visual foundation models to handle multiple tasks by steering them with demonstrative prompts. The choice of such prompts largely influences VICL performance, standing out as a key challenge. Prior work has made substantial progress on prompt retrieval and reranking strategies, but mainly focuses on prompt images while overlooking labels. We reveal these approaches sometimes get visually similar but label-inconsistent prompts, which potentially degrade VICL performance. On the other hand, higher label consistency between query and prompts preferably indicates stronger VICL results. Motivated by these findings, we develop a framework named LaPR (Label-aware Prompt Retrieval), which highlights the role of labels in prompt selection. Our framework first designs an image-label joint representation for prompts to incorporate label cues explicitly. Besides, to handle unavailable query labels at test time, we introduce a mixture-of-expert mechanism to the dual encoders with query-adaptive routing. Each expert is expected to capture a specific label mode, while the router infers query-adaptive mixture weights and helps to learn label-aware representation. We carefully design alternative optimization for experts and router, with a VICL performance-guided contrastive loss and a label-guided contrastive loss, respectively. Extensive experiments show promising and consistent improvement of LaPR on in-context segmentation, detection, and colorization tasks. Moreover, LaPR generalizes well across feature extractors and cross-fold scenarios, suggesting the importance of label utilization in prompt retrieval for VICL. Code is available at https://github.com/luotc-why/CVPR26-LaPR.

analysis.tldr: 提出标签感知的提示检索框架LaPR，通过图像-标签联合表示和混合专家机制提升视觉上下文学习性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 视觉上下文学习中提示选择对性能影响大，现有方法主要关注图像特征而忽略标签一致性，导致检索到视觉相似但标签不一致的提示，降低性能。
analysis.problem: 如何利用标签信息改进视觉上下文学习中的提示检索，避免标签不一致问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到视觉相似但标签不一致的提示会降低VICL性能，而查询与提示之间更高的标签一致性通常带来更强的VICL结果。
analysis.method: 提出LaPR框架，包括图像-标签联合表示和混合专家机制，通过VICL性能引导对比损失和标签引导对比损失交替优化专家和路由器。
contributions: 揭示标签一致性在VICL提示检索中的重要性
提出标签感知的提示检索框架LaPR，包含图像-标签联合表示和混合专家机制
在分割、检测和着色任务上取得一致改进，且泛化性好
analysis.experiments: 在上下文分割、检测和着色任务上进行实验，显示LaPR一致提升性能，且跨特征提取器和跨折场景泛化良好。
limitations: 可能依赖特定任务标签模式
混合专家机制增加计算开销
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出标签感知的提示检索框架LaPR，通过图像-标签联合表示和混合专家机制提升视觉上下文学习性能。

papers.title: Beyond Retrieval: Modeling Confidence Decay and Deterministic Agentic Platforms in Generative Engine Optimization
papers.abstract: Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) is rapidly reshaping digital marketing paradigms in the era of Large Language Models (LLMs). However, current GEO strategies predominantly rely on Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), which inherently suffers from probabilistic hallucinations and the "zero-click" paradox, failing to establish sustainable commercial trust. In this paper, we systematically deconstruct the probabilistic flaws of existing RAG-based GEO and propose a paradigm shift towards deterministic multi-agent intent routing. First, we mathematically formulate Semantic Entropy Drift (SED) to model the dynamic decay of confidence curves in LLMs over continuous temporal and contextual perturbations. To rigorously quantify optimization value in black-box commercial engines, we introduce the Isomorphic Attribution Regression (IAR) model, leveraging a Multi-Agent System (MAS) probe with strict human-in-the-loop physical isolation to enforce hallucination penalties. Furthermore, we architect the Deterministic Agent Handoff (DAH) protocol, conceptualizing an Agentic Trust Brokerage (ATB) ecosystem where LLMs function solely as intent routers rather than final answer generators. We empirically validate this architecture using EasyNote, an industrial AI meeting minutes product by Yishu Technology. By routing the intent of "knowledge graph mapping on an infinite canvas" directly to its specialized proprietary agent via DAH, we demonstrate the reduction of vertical task hallucination rates to near zero. This work establishes a foundational theoretical framework for next-generation GEO and paves the way for a well-ordered, deterministic human-AI collaboration ecosystem.

analysis.tldr: 提出确定性多智能体意图路由框架替代RAG，通过语义熵漂移建模和同构属性回归实现GEO中幻觉率趋零。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有GEO依赖RAG存在概率性幻觉和零点击悖论，无法建立可持续的商业信任，亟需确定性范式。
analysis.problem: 如何克服RAG-based GEO的概率性缺陷，实现低幻觉、高可信的生成引擎优化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出RAG存在概率性幻觉和零点击悖论。
analysis.method: 提出确定性多智能体意图路由框架，包括语义熵漂移(SED)建模置信度衰减、同构属性回归(IAR)量化优化价值、确定性智能体交接(DAH)协议及智能体信任经纪(ATB)生态系统。
contributions: 形式化定义语义熵漂移(SED)以建模LLM置信度随时间和上下文扰动的动态衰减。
提出同构属性回归(IAR)模型，结合多智能体系统探针和人在回路物理隔离，强制幻觉惩罚。
设计确定性智能体交接(DAH)协议，将LLM作为意图路由器而非答案生成器，构建智能体信任经纪(ATB)生态系统。
analysis.experiments: 在易书科技工业级AI会议纪要产品EasyNote上验证，通过DAH将“无限画布知识图谱映射”意图路由至专用智能体，垂直任务幻觉率降至近零。
limitations: 实验仅针对单一产品场景，泛化性待验证。
DAH协议依赖专用智能体生态，构建成本可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出确定性多智能体意图路由框架替代RAG，通过语义熵漂移建模和同构属性回归实现GEO中幻觉率趋零。

papers.title: Imagine Before Concentration: Diffusion-Guided Registers Enhance Partially Relevant Video Retrieval
papers.abstract: Partially Relevant Video Retrieval (PRVR) aims to retrieve untrimmed videos based on text queries that describe only partial events. Existing methods suffer from incomplete global contextual perception, struggling with query ambiguity and local noise induced by spurious responses. To address these issues, we propose DreamPRVR, which adopts a coarse-to-fine representation learning paradigm. The model first generates global contextual semantic registers as coarse-grained highlights spanning the entire video and then concentrates on fine-grained similarity optimization for precise cross-modal matching. Concretely, these registers are generated by initializing from the video-centric distribution produced by a probabilistic variational sampler and then iteratively refined via a text-supervised truncated diffusion model. During this process, textual semantic structure learning constructs a well-formed textual latent space, enhancing the reliability of global perception. The registers are then adaptively fused with video tokens through register-augmented Gaussian attention blocks, enabling context-aware feature learning. Extensive experiments show that DreamPRVR outperforms state-of-the-art methods. Code is released at https://github.com/lijun2005/CVPR26-DreamPRVR.

analysis.tldr: 提出扩散引导的全局语义寄存器，实现粗到细的部分相关视频检索。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有部分相关视频检索方法因全局上下文感知不完整，难以处理查询歧义和局部噪声，导致检索精度受限。
analysis.problem: 如何从未修剪视频中准确检索仅描述部分事件的文本查询对应的视频片段。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用粗到细表示学习范式：先通过概率变分采样器初始化全局上下文语义寄存器，再经文本监督截断扩散模型迭代细化；同时利用文本语义结构学习构建良好结构的文本潜在空间，并通过寄存器增强的高斯注意力块自适应融合视频令牌。
contributions: 提出DreamPRVR框架，利用扩散模型生成全局语义寄存器以增强部分相关视频检索。
设计寄存器增强的高斯注意力机制实现上下文感知特征学习。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上实验，DreamPRVR优于现有最先进方法。
limitations: 扩散模型迭代细化可能增加计算开销。
对极端长视频或复杂场景的泛化能力未在摘要中说明。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出扩散引导的全局语义寄存器，实现粗到细的部分相关视频检索。

papers.title: Motion-Adaptive Multi-Scale Temporal Modelling with Skeleton-Constrained Spatial Graphs for Efficient 3D Human Pose Estimation
papers.abstract: Accurate 3D human pose estimation from monocular videos requires effective modelling of complex spatial and temporal dependencies. However, existing methods often face challenges in efficiency and adaptability when modelling spatial and temporal dependencies, particularly under dense attention or fixed modelling schemes. In this work, we propose MASC-Pose, a Motion-Adaptive multi-scale temporal modelling framework with Skeleton-Constrained spatial graphs for efficient 3D human pose estimation. Specifically, it introduces an Adaptive Multi-scale Temporal Modelling (AMTM) module to adaptively capture heterogeneous motion dynamics at different temporal scales, together with a Skeleton-constrained Adaptive GCN (SAGCN) for joint-specific spatial interaction modelling. By jointly enabling adaptive temporal reasoning and efficient spatial aggregation, our method achieves strong accuracy with high computational efficiency. Extensive experiments on Human3.6M and MPI-INF-3DHP datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach.

analysis.tldr: 提出MASC-Pose框架，通过自适应多尺度时间建模和骨架约束空间图实现高效3D人体姿态估计。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法在建模时空依赖时效率低且适应性差，难以处理密集注意力或固定建模方案下的复杂动态。
analysis.problem: 从单目视频中高效且准确地估计3D人体姿态，需同时建模复杂空间和时间依赖。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出MASC-Pose框架，包含自适应多尺度时间建模模块（AMTM）和骨架约束自适应图卷积网络（SAGCN），分别用于捕获不同时间尺度的运动动态和关节特定的空间交互。
contributions: 提出自适应多尺度时间建模模块，动态捕获异构运动模式。
设计骨架约束自适应图卷积网络，实现高效空间交互建模。
